            if (identity) infoItems.push({ label: '身份', value: identity });
            if (appearance) infoItems.push({ label: '外貌', value: appearance });
            if (items) infoItems.push({ label: '持有物品', value: items });
            if (location) infoItems.push({ label: '所处地点', value: location });
            
            if (infoItems.length > 0) {
                infoGridHtml = '<div class="relationship-info-grid">';
                infoItems.forEach(item => {
                    infoGridHtml += `
                        <div class="relationship-info-item">
                            <strong>${item.label}</strong>
                            <span>${item.value}</span>
                        </div>
                    `;
                });
                infoGridHtml += '</div>';
            }
            
            // 处理当前状态（可能是对象或字符串）
            let currentStatusHtml = '';
            const rawStatus = this.SafeGetValue(rel, '当前状态', null);
            let statusText = '';
            
            if (rawStatus) {
                if (typeof rawStatus === 'object' && rawStatus !== null) {
                    // 如果是对象，提取状态名
                    statusText = this.SafeGetValue(rawStatus, '状态名', JSON.stringify(rawStatus));
                } else if (typeof rawStatus === 'string') {
                    statusText = rawStatus;
                }
                
                if (statusText) {
                    currentStatusHtml = `
                        <div class="relationship-current-status">
                            <strong>当前状态</strong>
                            <span>${statusText}</span>
                        </div>
                    `;
                }
            }
            const escapeName = this.escapeHtml(name); // 转义名称

            const tierStyle = this.getTierStyle(tierOrSequence);
            const favorabilityPercent = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, (favorability / 200) * 100));
            const importantClass = isImportant ? 'relationship-card-important' : '';
            const importantIcon = isImportant ? '⭐' : '☆';

            html += `
                <div class="relationship-card ${importantClass}" data-char-name="${escapeName}">
                    <div class="relationship-header">
                        <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;">
                            <p class="relationship-name" style="${tierStyle}">${escapeName}</p>
                            <span class="relationship-toggle-icon">▼</span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="relationship-actions">
                            <button class="rel-action-btn" data-action="toggle-important" title="标记/取消标记重要人物">${importantIcon}</button>
                            <button class="rel-action-btn rel-action-trade" data-action="trade" title="交易此人物(克隆)">🔄</button>
                            <button class="rel-action-btn rel-action-delete" data-action="delete" title="删除此人物">🗑️</button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="relationship-body">
                        ${portraitHtml} 
                        <div class="relationship-content-wrapper"> 
                            ${infoGridHtml}
                            ${statsHtml}
                            ${currentStatusHtml}
                            ${abilitiesHtml}
                            <div class="relationship-meta-list">
                                <div class="meta-item"><strong>关系:</strong> ${relationship}</div>
                                <div class="meta-item"><strong>序列:</strong> <span style="${tierStyle}">${tierOrSequence}</span></div>
                                <div class="favorability-section">
                                     <div class="favorability-label">好感度: ${favorability}</div>
                                     <div class="favorability-bar-container">
                                        <div class="favorability-bar-fill" style="width: ${favorabilityPercent}%;"></div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            ${
                              (currentState && currentState !== '暂无记录') ? `
                              <div class="latest-update">
                                <strong>最新动态:</strong> ${currentState}
                              </div>
                              ` : ''
                            }
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `;
        } catch (e) {
            console.error('渲染人物关系失败:', name, rel, e);
        }
    });

    return html + '</div>';
},


 async updateAndRefreshRelationshipState(newState) {
    this.currentMvuState = newState;
    // 将更新后的状态静默保存回SillyTavern，以确保数据持久化
    const messages = await getChatMessages('0');
    if (messages && messages.length > 0) {
        const messageZero = messages[0];
        messageZero.data = this.currentMvuState;
        await TavernHelper.setChatMessages([messageZero], { refresh: 'none' });
       console.log('[源堡-人物关系] 已将更新后的人物关系状态保存。');
    }
    // 重新渲染人物关系模态框以立即显示变化
    this.showRelationships();
},

// ==================== 产业管理UI函数 ====================
// Feature: industry-management-system

async showIndustryManagement() {
    this.openModal('industry-modal');
    
    // 显示加载动画
    const loading = document.getElementById('industry-loading');
    const container = document.getElementById('industry-list-container');
    const emptyState = document.getElementById('industry-empty-state');
    
    if (loading && container) {
        loading.style.display = 'flex';
        container.style.display = 'none';
        if (emptyState) emptyState.style.display = 'none';
    }
    
    // 性能优化：懒加载 - 只在首次打开时初始化产业管理器
    if (!this.industryManager) {
        console.log('[产业管理] 首次打开，开始初始化...');
        this.industryManager = new IndustryManager(this);
        this.returnCalculator = new CapitalReturnCalculator(this.industryManager);
        console.log('[产业管理] 系统初始化完成（手动结算模式）');
    }
    
    // 模拟异步加载（给用户反馈）
    await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 100));
    
    // 加载产业数据
    this.industryManager.loadFromGameData();
    
    // 🔥 新增：检测是否有产业需要结算
    const pendingSettlements = this.checkPendingSettlements();
    
    if (pendingSettlements.length > 0) {
        // 显示结算确认模态框
        await this.showSettlementConfirmation(pendingSettlements);
    }
    
    // 渲染UI
    this.renderIndustryDashboard();
    this.renderIndustryList();
    
    // 添加统计面板折叠按钮的事件监听器
    const dashboardHeader = document.getElementById('dashboard-header-toggle');
    if (dashboardHeader) {
        if (!dashboardHeader.dataset.listenerAdded) {
            dashboardHeader.addEventListener('click', () => {
                console.log('[产业管理] 统计面板折叠按钮被点击');
                this.toggleDashboard();
            });
            dashboardHeader.dataset.listenerAdded = 'true';
            console.log('[产业管理] 统计面板折叠事件监听器已添加');
        } else {
            console.log('[产业管理] 统计面板折叠事件监听器已存在，跳过添加');
        }
    } else {
        console.error('[产业管理] 未找到dashboard-header-toggle元素');
    }
    
    // 隐藏加载动画
    if (loading && container) {
        loading.style.display = 'none';
        container.style.display = 'block';
    }
},

renderIndustryDashboard() {
    // 性能优化：使用缓存的统计数据
    const stats = this.industryManager.getStatistics();
    
    // 格式化总月收益
    const totalMonthlyReturnParts = Object.entries(stats.monthlyReturnByCurrency).map(([currency, value]) => 
        formatCurrency(value, currency)
    );
    const totalMonthlyReturnStr = totalMonthlyReturnParts.length > 0 ? totalMonthlyReturnParts.join(', ') : '0';
    
    // 更新仪表盘
    document.getElementById('dashboard-total-valuation').textContent = stats.totalValuation;
    document.getElementById('dashboard-industry-count').textContent = stats.count;
    document.getElementById('dashboard-total-return').textContent = totalMonthlyReturnStr;
    document.getElementById('dashboard-avg-rate').textContent = `${stats.avgRate}%`;
},

// 切换统计面板的展开/折叠状态
toggleDashboard() {
    console.log('[产业管理] toggleDashboard被调用');
    const modalBody = document.querySelector('#industry-modal .modal-body');
    if (modalBody) {
        const wasCollapsed = modalBody.classList.contains('dashboard-collapsed');
        modalBody.classList.toggle('dashboard-collapsed');
        console.log(`[产业管理] 统计面板状态切换: ${wasCollapsed ? '折叠' : '展开'} -> ${!wasCollapsed ? '折叠' : '展开'}`);
    } else {
        console.error('[产业管理] 未找到modal-body元素');
    }
},

renderIndustryList() {
    const container = document.getElementById('industry-list-container');
    const emptyState = document.getElementById('industry-empty-state');
    const industries = this.industryManager.getAllIndustries();
    
    if (Object.keys(industries).length === 0) {
        container.innerHTML = '';
        emptyState.style.display = 'block';
        return;
    }
    
    emptyState.style.display = 'none';
    
    // 性能优化：使用DocumentFragment批量插入DOM
    const fragment = document.createDocumentFragment();
    for (const [id, industry] of Object.entries(industries)) {
        const card = this.renderIndustryCard(id, industry);
        fragment.appendChild(card);
    }
    
    // 一次性更新DOM，减少重排
    container.innerHTML = '';
    container.appendChild(fragment);
},

renderIndustryCard(id, industry) {
    const card = document.createElement('div');
    card.className = 'industry-card'; // 默认不展开
    card.dataset.industryId = id;
    
    // 解析货币字符串
    const capitalStr = industry.当前投入资本总额 || '0';
    const { value: capital, currency } = parseCurrency(capitalStr);
    const rate = industry.月均资本回报率 || 0;
    
    // ========== 新算法：三维度收益模型（优化版）==========
    
    // 1. 市场饱和度影响回报率
    const saturation = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, industry.市场饱和度 || 30));
    const marketFactor = 0.5 + ((saturation - 10) / 90);
    const actualRate = rate * marketFactor;
    
    // 2. 技术先进度 - 决定收益倍数（×2系数）
    const techIndex = Math.max(-200, Math.min(1000, industry.技术先进指数 || 0));
    let techPotential;
    if (techIndex <= 0) {
      techPotential = 1 - 0.0000125 * techIndex * techIndex;
    } else {
      techPotential = 1 + 0.000002 * techIndex * techIndex;  // ×2
    }
    techPotential = Math.max(0, Math.min(techPotential, 100));
    
    // 3. 计算毛利润
    const grossProfit = capital * (actualRate / 100) * techPotential;
    
    // 4. 运营效率影响成本
    const efficiency = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, industry.运营效率 || 50));
    const costMultiplier = 2 - efficiency / 100;
    const fixedCostRate = Math.max(0, industry.固定成本率 || 5);
    const actualFixedCost = capital * (fixedCostRate / 100) * costMultiplier;
    
    // 5. 最终净收益
    const monthlyReturn = grossProfit - actualFixedCost;
    
    // 趋势指示器
    const trendIndicator = this.renderTrendIndicator(rate);
    
    // 技术进度条
    const techProgressBar = this.renderTechProgressBar(industry.技术先进指数 || 0);

    
    card.innerHTML = `
        <div class="industry-card-header">
            <div class="industry-name">
                <span>${this.escapeHtml(industry.名称 || '未命名产业')}</span>
                <span class="industry-type-badge">${industry.类型 || '未知'}</span>
                <span class="industry-scale-badge">${industry.规模 || '未知'}</span>
                <span class="industry-toggle-icon">▼</span>
            </div>
            <div class="industry-trend-indicator ${monthlyReturn > 0 ? 'trend-up' : monthlyReturn < 0 ? 'trend-down' : 'trend-flat'}">
                ${this.renderTrendIndicator(monthlyReturn > 0 ? 1 : monthlyReturn < 0 ? -1 : 0)}
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="industry-card-body">
            <div class="industry-stat" data-tooltip="产业当前的总投入资本">
                <div class="industry-stat-label">💰 当前资本</div>
                <div class="industry-stat-value">${formatCurrency(capital, currency)}</div>
            </div>
            <div class="industry-stat" data-tooltip="基础月回报率（会受市场饱和度影响）。实际回报率 = 基础回报率 × 市场系数">
                <div class="industry-stat-label">📈 月回报率</div>
                <div class="industry-stat-value ${rate > 0 ? 'positive' : rate < 0 ? 'negative' : ''}">${rate > 0 ? '+' : ''}${rate}% → ${actualRate.toFixed(2)}%</div>
            </div>
            <div class="industry-stat" data-tooltip="毛利润 = 资本 × 实际回报率 × 技术系数。这是扣除固定成本前的收益">
                <div class="industry-stat-label">💰 月毛利润</div>
                <div class="industry-stat-value ${grossProfit > 0 ? 'positive' : 'negative'}">${grossProfit > 0 ? '+' : ''}${formatCurrency(grossProfit, currency)}</div>
            </div>
            <div class="industry-stat" data-tooltip="净收益 = 毛利润 - 实际固定成本。这是最终每月的盈亏">
                <div class="industry-stat-label">💵 月净收益</div>
                <div class="industry-stat-value ${monthlyReturn > 0 ? 'positive' : monthlyReturn < 0 ? 'negative' : ''}">${monthlyReturn > 0 ? '+' : ''}${formatCurrency(monthlyReturn, currency)}</div>
            </div>
            <div class="industry-stat" data-tooltip="技术先进程度（-200至1000）。直接提升收益倍数：技术500→×1.5，技术800→×2.28，技术1000→×3.0">
                <div class="industry-stat-label">⚙️ 技术先进度</div>
                <div class="industry-stat-value ${techIndex > 0 ? 'positive' : techIndex < 0 ? 'negative' : ''}">${techIndex > 0 ? '+' : ''}${techIndex} (×${techPotential.toFixed(2)})</div>
                ${techProgressBar}
            </div>
            <div class="industry-stat" data-tooltip="运营管理效率（0-100）。影响固定成本：效率100成本×1.0，效率50成本×1.5，效率0成本×2.0。低效率会导致严重浪费">
                <div class="industry-stat-label">📊 运营效率</div>
                <div class="industry-stat-value ${efficiency >= 70 ? 'positive' : efficiency >= 40 ? '' : 'negative'}">${efficiency}% (成本×${costMultiplier.toFixed(2)})</div>
            </div>
            <div class="industry-stat" data-tooltip="市场竞争饱和程度（0-100）。直接降低回报率：饱和度0%无影响，50%降低30%，80%降低48%，100%降低60%">
                <div class="industry-stat-label">📉 市场饱和度</div>
                <div class="industry-stat-value ${saturation <= 40 ? 'positive' : saturation <= 70 ? '' : 'negative'}">${saturation}% (回报×${marketFactor.toFixed(2)})</div>
            </div>
            <div class="industry-stat" data-tooltip="每月固定成本占资本的百分比。包括租金、设备折旧、固定工资等。实际支出受运营效率影响">
                <div class="industry-stat-label">💸 固定成本率</div>
                <div class="industry-stat-value ${fixedCostRate <= 5 ? 'positive' : fixedCostRate <= 10 ? '' : 'negative'}">${fixedCostRate.toFixed(1)}% (<span style="color: #d32f2f;">-${formatCurrency(actualFixedCost, currency)}</span>)</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="industry-card-details">
            <div class="industry-overview">${this.escapeHtml(industry.产业情况概述 || '暂无概述')}</div>
            ${industry.资产 ? `
                <div class="industry-assets">
                    <div class="industry-assets-title">📦 主要资产</div>
                    <div class="industry-assets-content">${this.escapeHtml(industry.资产)}</div>
                </div>
            ` : ''}
            ${industry.收入来源 ? `
                <div class="industry-income-source">
                    <div class="industry-income-title">💼 收入来源</div>
                    <div class="industry-income-content">${this.escapeHtml(industry.收入来源)}</div>
                </div>
            ` : ''}
            <div class="industry-meta-info">
                ${industry.创建时间 ? `创建于: ${industry.创建时间}` : ''}
                ${industry.上次结算时间 ? ` | 上次结算: ${industry.上次结算时间}` : ''}
            </div>
        </div>
    `;
    
    // 添加点击展开/收起功能
    card.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        // 防止事件冒泡到其他元素
        e.stopPropagation();
        card.classList.toggle('expanded');
    });
    
    return card;
},

renderTrendIndicator(rate) {
    if (rate > 0) {
        return '📈 <span style="font-size: 14px;">增长</span>';
    } else if (rate < 0) {
        return '📉 <span style="font-size: 14px;">衰退</span>';
    } else {
        return '➡️ <span style="font-size: 14px;">平稳</span>';
    }
},

renderTechProgressBar(techIndex) {
    // 约束范围：-200 到 1000
    const constrainedIndex = Math.max(-200, Math.min(1000, techIndex));
    
    // 计算进度条显示
    // 将 -200~1000 映射到 0~100% 的进度条
    // -200 = 0%, 0 = 16.67%, 1000 = 100%
    const percentage = ((constrainedIndex + 200) / 1200) * 100;
    
    // 根据技术先进度设置颜色
    let barColor = '#4a9eff'; // 默认蓝色
    if (constrainedIndex < 0) {
        barColor = '#ff6b6b'; // 负值红色
    } else if (constrainedIndex > 500) {
        barColor = '#51cf66'; // 高值绿色
    } else if (constrainedIndex > 200) {
        barColor = '#4a9eff'; // 中值蓝色
    } else {
        barColor = '#a09c91'; // 低值灰色
    }
    
    return `
        <div class="tech-progress-bar">
            <div class="tech-progress-fill" style="width: ${percentage}%; background-color: ${barColor};"></div>
        </div>
    `;
},

// ==================== 产业收益手动结算方法 ====================

/**
 * 检测哪些产业需要结算
 * @returns {Array} 待结算产业列表
 */
checkPendingSettlements() {
    const pendingList = [];
    const currentTime = this.currentMvuState?.stat_data?.当前时间纪元;
    
    if (!currentTime) {
        console.log('[产业结算] 当前时间不存在');
        return pendingList;
    }
    
    const industries = this.industryManager.getAllIndustries();
    
    for (const [id, industry] of Object.entries(industries)) {
        const capitalStr = industry.当前投入资本总额 || '0';
        const { value: capital, currency } = parseCurrency(capitalStr);
        
        // 跳过没有资本的产业
        if (capital <= 0) continue;
        
        // 获取上次结算时间
        const lastSettlementTime = industry.上次结算时间 || industry.创建时间 || currentTime;
        
        // 计算距离上次结算的周数
        const weeks = GameTimeParser.calculateWeeksDifference(lastSettlementTime, currentTime);
        
        // 如果超过1周，需要结算
        if (weeks >= 1) {
            // ======= 修复：使用真实模型计算预估值 =======
            const monthlyRate = industry.月均资本回报率 || 0;
            const saturation = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, industry.市场饱和度 || 30));
            const marketFactor = 1 - (saturation / 100) * 0.6;
            const actualRate = monthlyRate * marketFactor;
            
            const techIndex = Math.max(-200, Math.min(1000, industry.技术先进指数 || 0));
            let techPotential = techIndex <= 0 
                ? 1 - 0.0000125 * techIndex * techIndex 
                : 1 + 0.000002 * techIndex * techIndex;
            techPotential = Math.max(0, Math.min(techPotential, 100));
            
            const grossProfit = capital * (actualRate / 100) * techPotential;
            const efficiency = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, industry.运营效率 || 50));
            const costMultiplier = 2 - efficiency / 100;
            const fixedCostRate = Math.max(0, industry.固定成本率 || 5);
            const actualFixedCost = capital * (fixedCostRate / 100) * costMultiplier;
            
            const actualMonthlyReturn = grossProfit - actualFixedCost;
            
            // 真实估算总收益
            const estimatedIncome = Math.round((actualMonthlyReturn / 4) * weeks);
            
            pendingList.push({
                id,
                name: industry.名称,
                capital: capitalStr,
                weeks,
                lastSettlementTime,
                monthlyRate,
                techIndex,
                estimatedIncome: formatCurrency(estimatedIncome, currency)
            });
        }
    }
    
    console.log(`[产业结算] 检测到 ${pendingList.length} 个产业需要结算`);
    return pendingList;
},

/**
 * 显示结算确认模态框
 * @param {Array} pendingList - 待结算产业列表
 */
async showSettlementConfirmation(pendingList) {
    return new Promise((resolve) => {

        const modalHtml = `
            <div id="settlement-confirmation-modal" class="modal-overlay" style="display: flex; z-index: 10000;">
                <div class="modal-content" style="max-width: 600px; max-height: 80vh; overflow-y: auto;">
                    <div class="modal-header">
                        <h2>💰 产业收益结算</h2>
                    </div>
                    <div class="modal-body" style="padding: 20px;">
                        <p style="color: #f5deb3; margin-bottom: 15px;">
                            检测到以下产业有待结算的收益，是否现在结算？
                        </p>
                        <div style="background: rgba(0,0,0,0.3); border-radius: 6px; padding: 15px; margin-bottom: 20px;">
                            ${pendingList.map(item => `
                                <div style="padding: 10px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(139, 69, 19, 0.3); color: #dcd5c7;">
                                    <div style="font-weight: bold; color: #f5deb3; margin-bottom: 5px;">
                                        ${this.escapeHtml(item.name)}
                                    </div>
                                    <div style="font-size: 12px; color: #a09c91;">
                                        当前资本: ${this.escapeHtml(item.capital)} | 
                                        待结算: ${item.weeks}周 | 
                                        预计收益: ~${this.escapeHtml(item.estimatedIncome)}
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                            `).join('')}
                        </div>
                        <div style="color: #a09c91; font-size: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px;">
                            💡 提示：结算后收益将自动加入产业资本，并更新到游戏存档中。
                        </div>
                        <div style="display: flex; gap: 15px; justify-content: flex-end;">
                            <button id="btn-settlement-cancel" class="interaction-btn" style="background: rgba(139, 69, 19, 0.3);">
                                稍后结算
                            </button>
                            <button id="btn-settlement-confirm" class="interaction-btn" style="background: rgba(0, 100, 0, 0.5);">
                                立即结算
                            </button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        `;
        
        // 添加到页面
        const modalContainer = document.createElement('div');
        modalContainer.innerHTML = modalHtml;
        document.body.appendChild(modalContainer);
        
        // 绑定事件
        document.getElementById('btn-settlement-cancel').addEventListener('click', () => {

            resolve(false);
        });
        
        document.getElementById('btn-settlement-confirm').addEventListener('click', async () => {
            modalContainer.remove();
            console.log('[产业结算] 用户确认结算');
            
            // 执行结算
            await this.executeSettlement(pendingList);
            
            resolve(true);
        });
    });
},

/**
 * 执行产业收益结算
 * @param {Array} pendingList - 待结算产业列表
 */
async executeSettlement(pendingList) {
    console.log('[产业结算] 开始执行结算...');
    
    const currentTime = this.currentMvuState.stat_data.当前时间纪元;
    let totalReturnByCurrency = {};
    let incomeDetails = [];
    
    for (const item of pendingList) {
        const industry = this.industryManager.industries[item.id];
        if (!industry) continue;
        
        const capitalStr = industry.当前投入资本总额 || '0';
        const { value: capital, currency } = parseCurrency(capitalStr);
        
        if (capital <= 0) continue;
        
        // ==================== 核心修复：统一使用面板上的三维度收益模型计算 ====================
        const monthlyRate = industry.月均资本回报率 || 0;
        
        // 1. 市场饱和度影响
        const saturation = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, industry.市场饱和度 || 30));
        const marketFactor = 1 - (saturation / 100) * 0.6;
        const actualRate = monthlyRate * marketFactor;
        
        // 2. 技术先进度决定收益倍数
        const techIndex = Math.max(-200, Math.min(1000, industry.技术先进指数 || 0));
        let techPotential = techIndex <= 0 
            ? 1 - 0.0000125 * techIndex * techIndex 
            : 1 + 0.000002 * techIndex * techIndex;
        techPotential = Math.max(0, Math.min(techPotential, 100));
        
        // 3. 计算毛利润
        const grossProfit = capital * (actualRate / 100) * techPotential;
        
        // 4. 运营效率与固定成本
        const efficiency = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, industry.运营效率 || 50));
        const costMultiplier = 2 - efficiency / 100;
        const fixedCostRate = Math.max(0, industry.固定成本率 || 5);
        const actualFixedCost = capital * (fixedCostRate / 100) * costMultiplier;
        
        // 5. 真实月净收益
        const actualMonthlyReturn = grossProfit - actualFixedCost;
        
        // 6. 根据结算周数计算本次总收益 (周收益 = 月收益 / 4)
        const returnAmount = (actualMonthlyReturn / 4) * item.weeks;
        
        // 7. 应用资本变动 (四舍五入并兜底不能低于0)
        const newCapitalValue = Math.max(0, Math.round(capital + returnAmount));
        const newCapitalStr = formatCurrency(newCapitalValue, currency);
        
        // 8. 重新核对实际应用的收益额（防止兜底0导致账面不平）
        const finalReturnAmount = newCapitalValue - capital;
        // ====================================================================================
        
        // 累计收益
        if (!totalReturnByCurrency[currency]) {
            totalReturnByCurrency[currency] = 0;
        }
        totalReturnByCurrency[currency] += finalReturnAmount;
        
        // 记录详情
        incomeDetails.push({
            name: industry.名称,
            type: industry.类型,
            scale: industry.规模,
            overview: industry.产业情况概述,
            assets: industry.资产,
            incomeSource: industry.收入来源,
            oldCapital: capitalStr,
            income: formatCurrency(finalReturnAmount, currency),
            newCapital: newCapitalStr,
            weeks: item.weeks,
            monthlyRate: monthlyRate,
            techIndex: industry.技术先进指数 || 0,
            efficiency: industry.运营效率 || 50,
            saturation: industry.市场饱和度 || 30,
            fixedCostRate: industry.固定成本率 || 5
        });
        
        // 关键：更新产业数据
        this.industryManager.updateIndustry(item.id, {
            当前投入资本总额: newCapitalStr,
            上次结算时间: currentTime
        });
        
        console.log(`[产业结算] ${industry.名称}: ${capitalStr} → ${newCapitalStr} (收益: ${formatCurrency(finalReturnAmount, currency)})`);
    }
    
    // 格式化总收益
    const returnSummary = Object.entries(totalReturnByCurrency)
        .map(([currency, amount]) => formatCurrency(amount, currency))
        .join(', ') || '0';
    
    console.log(`[产业结算] 结算完成，总收益: ${returnSummary}`);
    
    // 🔥 关键：更新最后一条快照（与变量编辑器相同的方式）
    try {
        const lastSnapshot = this.chatHistoryCache.at(-1);
        if (lastSnapshot) {
            lastSnapshot.data = _.cloneDeep(this.currentMvuState); // 更新最新快照
            await AppStorage.saveData(this._getHistoryKey(), this.chatHistoryCache); // 持久化
            console.log('[产业结算] 已保存到最新快照，ID:', lastSnapshot.message_id);
        } else {
            console.warn('[产业结算] 无法获取最后一条快照，数据未持久化');
        }
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('[产业结算] 保存快照失败:', error);
        this.showTemporaryMessage('⚠️ 数据保存失败，请重试', 3000);
        return;
    }
    
    // 显示结算报告
    await this.saveSettlementSnapshot(incomeDetails, returnSummary, currentTime);
    
    // 显示结算结果
    this.showSettlementResult(incomeDetails, returnSummary);
    
    // 刷新UI
    this.industryManager.loadFromGameData();
    this.renderIndustryDashboard();
    this.renderIndustryList();
},

/**
 * 显示结算结果
 * @param {Array} incomeDetails - 收益详情
 * @param {string} returnSummary - 总收益摘要
 */
showSettlementResult(incomeDetails, returnSummary) {
    const detailsHtml = incomeDetails.map(detail => 
        `  • ${detail.name}: +${detail.income} (${detail.weeks}周)`
    ).join('\n');
    
    this.showTemporaryMessage(
        `💰 产业收益结算完成！\n\n` +
        `总收益: ${returnSummary}\n\n` +
        `详细收益:\n${detailsHtml}`,
        8000
    );
},

// ==================== 产业管理UI函数结束 ====================

handleRelationshipAction(action, charName) {
    if (!this.currentMvuState || !this.currentMvuState.stat_data) {
        this.showTemporaryMessage('无法操作，状态数据丢失。');
        return;
    }
    const newState = _.cloneDeep(this.currentMvuState);
    const originalCharName = this.unescapeHtml(charName);
    const character = _.get(newState, `stat_data.人物关系列表.${originalCharName }`);

    if (!character) {
        this.showTemporaryMessage(`未找到名为 “${originalCharName }” 的角色。`);
        return;
    }

    switch (action) {
        case 'toggle-important': {
            const isCurrentlyImportant = character.isImportant || false;
            character.isImportant = !isCurrentlyImportant;
            this.updateAndRefreshRelationshipState(newState);
            this.showTemporaryMessage(`已将 “${originalCharName }” ${character.isImportant ? '标记为重要人物' : '取消重要标记'}`);
            break;
        }
        case 'trade': {
            this.initiateTradeFromRelationship(originalCharName, character);
            break;
        }
        case 'delete': {
            this.showCustomConfirm(`确定要永久删除人物 “${originalCharName }” 吗？此操作不可恢复。`, () => {
                delete newState.stat_data['人物关系列表'][originalCharName ];
                this.updateAndRefreshRelationshipState(newState);
                this.showTemporaryMessage(`已删除人物 “${originalCharName }”。`);
            });
            break;
        }
        default:
            console.warn(`未知的关系操作: ${action}`);
    }
},

          getTierStyle(tier) {
              if (!tier) return 'color: #D3D3D3;';

              // --- 基础动画与特效定义 ---
              const lowGlow = 'text-shadow: 0 0 1px currentColor;';
              const midGlow = 'text-shadow: 0 0 6px currentColor;';
              const highGlow = 'text-shadow: 0 0 6px currentColor, 0 0 10px currentColor;';
              const angel = 'text-shadow: 0 0 10px currentColor, 0 0 20px currentColor;';

              // --- 重置/增强：最高位阶特效 ---
              
              // 1. 序列0：真神 —— 强调“神圣性”与“权威”
              // 使用了白金、流金与深紫的交织，光晕更加厚重
              const godGlow = `background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFF5E1 0%, #FFD700 25%, #D8BFFF 50%, #FFD700 75%, #FFF5E1 100%); background-size: 200% auto; -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; color: transparent; text-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(216, 191, 255, 0.8), 0 0 25px rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.5); font-weight: bold;`;

              // 2. 旧日：宇宙支配者 —— 强调“星空”、“诡秘”与“深渊”
              const outerGodGlow = `background: linear-gradient(45deg, #4B0082,  #00CED1, #00d1ce); background-size: 200% auto; -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; color: transparent; text-shadow: 0 0 15px #8A2BE2, 0 0 30px #4B0082, 0 0 45px #000033; font-weight: bold; letter-spacing: 1px;`;

              // 3. 支柱：宇宙基石 —— 强调“绝对性”、“起源”与“万物归一”
              const pillarGlow = `background: linear-gradient(45deg, #FFFFFF 0%, #FFD700 20%, #87CEEB 40%, #FF69B4 60%, #FFD700 80%, #FFFFFF 100%); background-size: 300% auto; -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; color: transparent; text-shadow: 0 0 20px #FFFFFF, 0 0 40px #FFD700, 0 0 60px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6); font-weight: 900; text-transform: uppercase;`;

              // 2. 样式映射表
              const styles = {
                '支柱': pillarGlow,
                '旧日': outerGodGlow,
                '序列0': godGlow,
                '序列0.1': godGlow,
                // 准神系列：使用 angel 级别特效
                '序列0.3': `background: linear-gradient(90deg, #C71585, #D8BFFF, #E0BFFF); background-position: center; -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; color: transparent; ${angel}`,
                '序列0.4': `background: linear-gradient(90deg, #C71585, #D8BFFF, #E0BFFF); background-position: center; -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; color: transparent; ${angel}`,
                '序列0.5': `background: linear-gradient(90deg, #C71585, #D8BFFF, #E0BFFF); background-position: center; -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; color: transparent; ${angel}`,
                '序列0.8': `background: linear-gradient(90deg, #C71585, #D8BFFF, #E0BFFF); background-position: center; -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; color: transparent; ${angel}`,
                '序列0.9': `background: linear-gradient(90deg, #B22222, #C71585, #E0BFFF); background-position: center; -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; color: transparent; ${angel}`,
                
                // 中低序列
                '序列1': `background: linear-gradient(90deg, #B22222, #C71585, #E0BFFF); background-position: center; -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; color: transparent; ${angel}`,
                '序列2': `background: linear-gradient(90deg, #FFD700, #FFC0CB, #FF69B4); background-position: center; -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; color: transparent; ${angel}`,
                '序列3': `background: linear-gradient(90deg, #FFA500, #FFC145, #FFD700); background-position: center; -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; color: transparent; ${highGlow}`,
                '序列4': `background: linear-gradient(90deg, #B22222, #DC143C, #FFA500); background-position: center; -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; color: transparent; ${highGlow}`,
                '序列5': `background: linear-gradient(90deg, #483D8B, #800080, #FF69B4); background-position: center; -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; color: transparent; ${midGlow}`,
                '序列6': `background: linear-gradient(90deg, #2F4F4F, #3CB371, #48D1CC); background-position: center; -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; color: transparent; ${midGlow}`,
                '序列7': `background: linear-gradient(90deg, #5FB8E6, #7A85D9, #6A5ACD); background-position: center; -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; color: transparent; ${midGlow}`,
                '序列8': `background: linear-gradient(90deg, #B0E2FF, #87CEEB, #5FB8E6); background-position: center; -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; color: transparent; ${lowGlow}`,
                '序列9': `background: linear-gradient(90deg, #F9E6C8, #F5DEB3, #F0D59E); background-position: center; -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; color: transparent; ${lowGlow}`,
              };

            const baseStyle = 'font-family: "Georgia", serif; display: inline-block; transition: all 0.3s ease;';

              // 2. 匹配逻辑优化
              // 优先匹配“支柱”和“旧日”关键词
              if (tier.includes('支柱')) return (styles['支柱'] || '') + baseStyle;
              if (tier.includes('旧日')) return (styles['旧日'] || '') + baseStyle;

              // 匹配“序列+数字”的部分
              const tierMatch = tier.match(/序列\s*\d+(?:\.\d+)?/);
              const pureTier = tierMatch ? tierMatch[0].replace(/\s+/g, '') : tier; // 移除空格统一匹配

              return (styles[pureTier] || 'color: #D3D3D3;') + baseStyle;
            },

//序列
          getTierOrder(tier) {
            const tierOrder = {
              '普通': 1, '非凡': 2, '罕见': 3, '史诗': 4,
              '传说': 5, '神话': 6, '唯一': 7,'旧日': 15,'支柱': 20,

              '序列9': 1, '序列8': 2, '序列7': 3, '序列6': 4,
              '序列5': 5, '序列4': 6, '序列3': 7, '序列2': 8, '序列1': 9, '序列0': 10
            };
            return tierOrder[tier] || 0;
          },

          sortByTier(items, getTierFn) {
            if (!Array.isArray(items)) return items;
            return [...items].sort((a, b) => {
              const tierA = getTierFn(a);
              const tierB = getTierFn(b);
              const orderA = this.getTierOrder(tierA);
              const orderB = this.getTierOrder(tierB);
              if (orderA === orderB) return 0;
              return orderB - orderA;
            });
          },

          getTierColorStyle(tier) {
            const demigodGlow = 'text-shadow: 0 0 5px currentColor, 0 0 8px currentColor;';
            const legendGlow = 'animation: ethereal-pulse 3s infinite; text-shadow: 0 0 8px currentColor, 0 0 12px currentColor;';
            const mythGlow = `background: linear-gradient(90deg, #E6E6FA, #D8BFD8, #DDA0DD); -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; color: transparent; ${legendGlow}`;
//变色
            const tierColors = {
              普通: '#A9A9A9',
              非凡: 'background: linear-gradient(90deg, #B0E2FF 0%, #87CEEB 50%, #5FB8E6 100%); -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; color: transparent; ${demigodGlow}',
              罕见: 'background: linear-gradient(90deg, #483D8B 0%, #800080 50%, #FF69B4 100%); -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; color: transparent; ${demigodGlow}',
              史诗: `background: linear-gradient(90deg, #FFA500 0%, #FFC145 50%, #FFD700 100%); -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; color: transparent; ${demigodGlow}`,
              传说: `background: linear-gradient(90deg, #FFD700 0%, #FFC0CB 50%, #FF69B4 100%); -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; color: transparent; ${legendGlow}`,
              神话: `background: linear-gradient(90deg, #B22222 0%, #C71585 50%, #E0BFFF 100%); -webkit-background-clip: text; background-clip: text; color: transparent; ${legendGlow}`,
              唯一: mythGlow,
            };
            const color = tierColors[tier] || '#D3D3D3';
            if (typeof color === 'string' && color.startsWith('color')) return color;
            if (typeof color === 'string' && color.startsWith('background')) return color;
            return `color: ${color};`;
          },

          updateTalentAndLinggen(data) {
    const container = document.getElementById('talent-linggen-list');
    if (!container) return;
    container.innerHTML = '';

    let html = '';
    const tianfuObj = this.SafeGetValue(data, ['非凡特性列表', 'abilities'], {});
    
    // 【核心修正】使用 Object.entries() 同时获取键（名称）和值（详情）
    const tianfuEntries = Object.entries(tianfuObj).filter(([name, details]) => typeof details === 'object' && details !== null && name !== '$meta');

    if (tianfuEntries.length > 0) {
        // 修正排序函数，使其能处理 [键, 值] 数组
        const sortedTianfuEntries = this.sortByTier(tianfuEntries, ([name, details]) => this.SafeGetValue(details, ['等阶', 'tier'], '普通'));
        
        sortedTianfuEntries.forEach(([name, tianfu]) => { // 直接解构出 name 和 tianfu 对象
            const tier = this.SafeGetValue(tianfu, ['等阶', 'tier'], '普通');
            const description = this.SafeGetValue(tianfu, ['描述', 'description'], '无描述');
            const tierStyle = this.getTierColorStyle(tier);

            let bonusHtml = '';
            // 修正排除列表，因为 name, tier, description 不再是 tianfu 对象的属性
            const excludeKeys = ['等阶', 'tier', '描述', 'description'];
            for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(tianfu)) {
                if (!excludeKeys.includes(key)) {
                    let effectText = value;
                    if(typeof value === 'object' && value !== null) {
                        effectText = Object.entries(value).map(([effKey, effVal]) => `${effKey}: ${effVal > 0 ? '+' : ''}${effVal}`).join(', ');
                    }
                    bonusHtml += `<p style="margin-top: 5px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(169, 197, 209, 0.1); padding-top: 5px;"><strong>${key}:</strong> ${effectText}</p>`;
                }
            }

            html += `
                 <details class="details-container">
                     <summary>
                         <span class="attribute-name">特性</span>
                         <span class="attribute-value" style="${tierStyle}">【${tier}】 ${name}</span>
                     </summary>
                     <div class="details-content">
                        <p>${description}</p>
                        ${bonusHtml}
                     </div>
                 </details>
             `;
        });
    } else {
      html += `
           <div class="attribute-item">
               <span class="attribute-name">途径</span>
               <span class="attribute-value">尚未选择</span>
           </div>
       `;
    }
    container.innerHTML = html;
},

formatObject(obj, depth = 0) {
  if (obj === null || typeof obj !== 'object' || Array.isArray(obj)) {
    return String(obj); // 非对象/数组直接转字符串
  }
  if (depth > 2) return '[深层结构]'; // 限制嵌套深度
  return Object.entries(obj)
    .map(([k, v]) => `${k}: ${this.formatObject(v, depth + 1)}`) // 递归调用时用 this
    .join('，');
},

          renderInventory(stat_data) {
    if (!stat_data || Object.keys(stat_data).length === 0) {
        return '<p class="modal-placeholder" style="text-align:center; color:#a09c91; font-size:12px;">物品栏为空。</p>';
    }

    const categories = [
        { title: '扮演法', key: '扮演法列表', equipable: true },
        { title: '辅助能力', key: '辅助能力列表', equipable: true },  // 新增：辅助能力列表
        { title: '武器', key: '武器列表', equipable: true },
        { title: '衣物', key: '衣物列表', equipable: true },
        { title: '饰品', key: '饰品列表', equipable: true },
        { title: '封印物', key: '封印物列表', equipable: true },
        { title: '消耗品', key: '消耗品列表', equipable: false },
        { title: '杂物', key: '杂物列表', equipable: false },
    ];

    

    let html = '';
    categories.forEach(cat => {
        let itemsObj = this.SafeGetValue(stat_data, cat.key, {});

        if (cat.key === '杂物列表') {
            const otherItems = this.SafeGetValue(stat_data, '其他列表', {});
            Object.assign(itemsObj, otherItems);
        }

        // 【兼容性修正】在获取列表后，检查每个物品是否有中文名，如果没有，则认为英文名是主名
        const itemsList = Object.values(itemsObj).filter(item => 
            typeof item === 'object' && item !== null && (item.名称 || item.name)
        );

        html += `<details class="inventory-category" open>`;
        html += `<summary class="inventory-category-title">${cat.title}</summary>`;

        if (itemsList.length > 0) {
            html += '<div class="inventory-item-list">';
            const sortedItems = this.sortByTier(itemsList, (item) => this.SafeGetValue(item, ['品阶', 'tier', '序列', 'sequence'], '普通'));

            sortedItems.forEach(item => {
                try {
                    const name = this.SafeGetValue(item, ['名称', 'name'], '未知物品');
                    if (!item.id && cat.equipable) {
                        item.id = name;
                    }

                    const itemJson = this.escapeHtml(JSON.stringify(item));
                    const id = this.SafeGetValue(item, 'id', null);
                    const tier = this.SafeGetValue(item, ['品阶', 'tier', '序列', 'sequence'], '无');
                    const hasQuantity = item.hasOwnProperty('数量') || item.hasOwnProperty('quantity');
                    const quantity = parseFloat(this.SafeGetValue(item, ['数量', 'quantity'], 1)) || 1; // 保留小数，兜底为1
                    const rawDescription = this.SafeGetValue(item, ['描述', 'description'], '无描述');
                    const description = this.formatObject(rawDescription);

                    const pendingUses = this.pendingActions.filter(action => action.action === 'use' && action.itemName === name).reduce((total, action) => total + action.quantity, 0);
                    const pendingDiscards = this.pendingActions.filter(action => action.action === 'discard' && action.itemName === name).reduce((total, action) => total + action.quantity, 0);
                    const displayQuantity = quantity - pendingUses - pendingDiscards;

                    // 仅过滤≤0的非小数/纯0，保留0.X
                    if (
                        (hasQuantity && displayQuantity <= 0 && Math.abs(displayQuantity) < 0.1) // 仅过滤接近0的数值（避免浮点精度问题）
                        || (!hasQuantity && pendingDiscards > 0)
                    ) {
                        return;
                    }

                    const formattedTier = tier !== '无' && !isNaN(tier) ? `序列${tier}` : tier;
                    const tierStyle = this.getTierStyle(formattedTier);
                    const tierDisplay = tier !== '无' ? `<span class="item-tier-display" style="${tierStyle}">等阶: ${formattedTier}</span>` : '';
                    // 优化浮点精度，四舍五入到1位小数
                    const formattedQuantity = Number(Math.round(displayQuantity * 10) / 10).toFixed(1);
                    // 再处理整数显示（比如1.0 → 1）
                    const finalQuantity = formattedQuantity.endsWith('.0') 
                        ? parseInt(formattedQuantity, 10) 
                        : formattedQuantity;
                    const quantityDisplay = hasQuantity ? `<span class="item-quantity">数量: ${finalQuantity}</span>` : '';
                    const isEquipped = id ? Object.values(this.equippedItems).some(equippedItem => equippedItem && equippedItem.id === id) : false;
                    let actionButtonsHtml = '';

                    if (cat.equipable) {
                        actionButtonsHtml += `<div class="item-actions">`;
                        if (isEquipped) {
                            const slotKey = Object.keys(this.equippedItems).find(key => this.equippedItems[key] && this.equippedItems[key].id === id);
                            actionButtonsHtml += `<button class="item-unequip-btn" data-slot-id="equip-${slotKey}">卸下</button>`;
                        } else {
                            actionButtonsHtml += `<button class="item-equip-btn">装备</button>`;
                        }
                        actionButtonsHtml += `<button class="item-discard-btn">丢弃</button>`;
                        actionButtonsHtml += `<button class="item-trade-btn">交易</button>`;
                        actionButtonsHtml += `</div>`;
                    } else if (cat.title === '消耗品') {
                        actionButtonsHtml = `<div class="item-actions"><button class="item-use-btn">使用</button><button class="item-discard-btn">丢弃</button><button class="item-trade-btn">交易</button></div>`;
                    } else {
                        actionButtonsHtml = `<div class="item-actions"><button class="item-discard-btn">丢弃</button><button class="item-trade-btn">交易</button></div>`;
                    }

                    
                    const rawDetails = this.renderItemDetailsForInventory(item);
                    const itemDetailsHtml = rawDetails ? this.formatObject(rawDetails) : '';

                    html += `
                        <div class="inventory-item" data-item-details='${itemJson}' data-category='${cat.title}'>
                            <div class="inventory-item-header">
                                <span class="item-name" style="${tierStyle}">${name}</span>
                                <span class="inventory-toggle-icon">▼</span>
                            </div>
                            <div class="inventory-item-details">
                                <div class="item-name-desc">
                                    <div class="item-description">${description}</div>
                                    ${itemDetailsHtml ? `<div class="item-details">${itemDetailsHtml}</div>` : ''}
                                </div>
                                <div class="item-meta">
                                    ${tierDisplay}
                                    ${quantityDisplay}
                                    ${actionButtonsHtml}
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    `;
                } catch (e) {
                    console.error('渲染物品条目失败:', item, e);
                }
            });
            html += '</div>';
        } else {
            html += '<div class="inventory-item-list"><p class="empty-category-text">空无一物</p></div>';
        }
        html += `</details>`;
    });

    return html;
},

// ====================================================================
    // 核心物品操作函数 (Equip/Unequip/Use/Discard Core Functions)
    // ====================================================================

    equipItem(item, category, buttonElement) {
        const itemId = this.SafeGetValue(item, 'id');
        if (!itemId || itemId === 'N/A') {
            this.showTemporaryMessage('物品无ID，无法装备。');
            return;
        }

        const categoryMap = { 武器: 'wuqi', 衣物: 'fangju', 饰品: 'shipin', 封印物: 'fabao1', 扮演法: 'zhuxiuGongfa', 辅助能力: 'fuxiuXinfa' };
        const slotKey = categoryMap[category];

        if (!slotKey) {
            this.showTemporaryMessage('错误的装备分类或类型。');
            return;
        }

        const currentlyEquippedSlot = Object.keys(this.equippedItems).find(key => this.equippedItems[key] && this.equippedItems[key].id === itemId);
        if (currentlyEquippedSlot && currentlyEquippedSlot !== slotKey) {
            const oldSlotElement = document.getElementById(`equip-${currentlyEquippedSlot}`);
            if (oldSlotElement) {
                this.unequipItem(`equip-${currentlyEquippedSlot}`, oldSlotElement, false);
            }
        }

        const slotElement = document.getElementById(`equip-${slotKey}`);
        if (!slotElement) return;

        const oldItem = this.equippedItems[slotKey];
        if (oldItem) {
            this.unequipItem(`equip-${slotKey}`, slotElement, false);
        }

        this.equippedItems[slotKey] = item;
        // 修复：支持品阶和序列字段，并格式化纯数字序列
        const tier = this.SafeGetValue(item, ['品阶', '序列'], '普通');
        const formattedTier = (!isNaN(tier) && tier !== '普通') ? `序列${tier}` : tier;
        const tierStyle = this.getTierStyle(formattedTier);
        slotElement.textContent = this.SafeGetValue(item, '名称');
        slotElement.setAttribute('style', tierStyle);
        slotElement.classList.add('equipped');
        slotElement.dataset.itemDetails = JSON.stringify(item);

        if (buttonElement.closest('#inventory-modal')) {
            this.showInventory();
        }

        const itemName = this.SafeGetValue(item, '名称');
        const defaultTextMap = { wuqi: '武器', fangju: '衣物', shipin: '饰品', fabao1: '封印物', zhuxiuGongfa: '扮演法', fuxiuXinfa: '辅助能力' };
        const slotFriendlyName = defaultTextMap[slotKey] || category;
        this.pendingActions = this.pendingActions.filter(action => action.itemName !== itemName);
        this.pendingActions.push({ action: 'equip', itemName: itemName, category: slotFriendlyName });

        this.showTemporaryMessage(`已装备 ${this.SafeGetValue(item, '名称')}`);
        this.updateDisplayedAttributes();
        this.saveEquipmentState();
        this.savePendingActions();
    },

    unequipItem(slotId, slotElement, showMessage = true, refreshInventoryUI = true) {
        const slotKey = slotId.replace('equip-', '');
        const defaultTextMap = { wuqi: '武器', fangju: '衣物', shipin: '饰品', fabao1: '封印物', zhuxiuGongfa: '扮演法', fuxiuXinfa: '辅助能力' };
        const itemDataString = slotElement.dataset.itemDetails;
        if (!itemDataString) return;

        let itemName = '一件装备';
        try {
            const item = JSON.parse(itemDataString);
            itemName = this.SafeGetValue(item, '名称');
        } catch (e) {
            console.error('卸载时解析物品数据失败:', e);
        }

        this.equippedItems[slotKey] = null;
        slotElement.textContent = defaultTextMap[slotKey] || '空';
        slotElement.classList.remove('equipped');
        slotElement.removeAttribute('style');
        delete slotElement.dataset.itemDetails;

        if (refreshInventoryUI) {
            this.showInventory();
        }

        this.pendingActions = this.pendingActions.filter(action => action.itemName !== itemName);
        this.pendingActions.push({ action: 'unequip', itemName: itemName, category: defaultTextMap[slotKey] });

        if (showMessage) {
            this.showTemporaryMessage(`已卸下 ${itemName}`);
        }
        this.updateDisplayedAttributes();
        this.saveEquipmentState();
        this.savePendingActions();
    },

    useItem(item, buttonElement) {
        const itemName = this.SafeGetValue(item, '名称');
        if (itemName === 'N/A') {
            this.showTemporaryMessage('物品信息错误，无法使用。');
            return;
        }
        const originalQuantity = parseInt(this.SafeGetValue(item, '数量', 0), 10);
        const pendingUses = this.pendingActions.filter(action => action.action === 'use' && action.itemName === itemName).reduce((total, action) => total + action.quantity, 0);
        if (originalQuantity - pendingUses <= 0) {
            this.showTemporaryMessage(`${itemName} 已用完或已在指令队列中。`);
            return;
        }
        const existingAction = this.pendingActions.find(action => action.action === 'use' && action.itemName === itemName);
        if (existingAction) {
            existingAction.quantity++;
        } else {
            this.pendingActions.push({ action: 'use', itemName: itemName, quantity: 1 });
        }
        this.showTemporaryMessage(`已将 [使用 ${itemName}] 加入指令队列`);
        this.savePendingActions();
        this.showInventory();
    },

    discardItem(item, category, itemElement) {
        const itemName = this.SafeGetValue(item, '名称');
        if (itemName === 'N/A') {
            this.showTemporaryMessage('物品信息错误，无法丢弃。');
            return;
        }
        const hasQuantity = item.hasOwnProperty('数量');
        if (hasQuantity && (category === '消耗品' || category === '杂物')) {
            this.promptDiscardQuantity(item, category, itemElement);
        } else {
            this.confirmDiscardItem(item, category, itemElement, 1);
        }
    },

    // ==================== 交易功能 ====================
    async initiateTradeFromInventory(item, category) {
        const itemName = this.SafeGetValue(item, ['名称', 'name'], '未知物品');
        
        // 确定物品所属列表
        const listMapping = {
            '扮演法': '扮演法列表',
            '辅助能力': '辅助能力列表',
            '武器': '武器列表',
            '衣物': '衣物列表',
            '饰品': '饰品列表',
            '封印物': '封印物列表',
            '消耗品': '消耗品列表',
            '杂物': '杂物列表'
        };
        
        const listName = listMapping[category] || '杂物列表';
        const isConsumable = (category === '消耗品' || category === '杂物');
        
        // 获取玩家ID
        let playerId;
        try {
            playerId = await this.getPlayerId();
        } catch (e) {
            this.showTemporaryMessage('无法获取玩家ID，请确保已登录');
            return;
        }
        
        // 生成Discord Bot命令 - 普通物品交易
        // 格式：/trade request target: player_id: item_list: item_name: [quantity:]
        let command = `/trade request target: player_id:${playerId} item_list:${listName} item_name:${itemName}`;
        
        // 如果是消耗品，添加数量参数
        if (isConsumable) {
            const quantity = this.SafeGetValue(item, ['数量', 'quantity'], 1);
            command += ` quantity:${quantity}`;
        }
        
        // 显示交易指引模态框
        this.showTradeCommandModal(command, itemName, item, false, isConsumable);
    },
    
    async initiateTradeFromRelationship(charName, character) {
        // 获取玩家ID
        let playerId;
        try {
            playerId = await this.getPlayerId();
        } catch (e) {
            this.showTemporaryMessage('无法获取玩家ID，请确保已登录');
            return;
        }
        
        // 生成Discord Bot命令 - NPC交易
        // 格式：/trade npc target: buyer_name: player_id: npc_name:
        const command = `/trade npc target: buyer_name: player_id:${playerId} npc_name:${charName}`;
        
        // 显示交易指引模态框
        this.showTradeCommandModal(command, charName, character, true, false);
    },
    
    showTradeCommandModal(command, itemName, item, isNpc = false, isConsumable = false) {
        const modal = document.createElement('div');
        modal.className = 'modal-overlay';
        modal.style.display = 'flex';
        modal.style.zIndex = '10001'; // 确保在物品栏模态框之上
        
        const tier = this.SafeGetValue(item, isNpc ? '当前序列' : ['品阶', 'tier', '序列', 'sequence'], '普通');
        const formattedTier = (!isNaN(tier) && tier !== '普通') ? `序列${tier}` : tier;
        const description = this.SafeGetValue(item, isNpc ? '描述' : ['描述', 'description'], '无描述');
        const itemTypeText = isNpc ? '人物' : '物品';
        
        // 根据是否为NPC交易，显示不同的步骤说明
        const stepsHtml = isNpc ? `
            <div style="margin-bottom: 8px;">
                <strong style="color: #daa520;">1.</strong> 点击下方按钮复制交易命令
            </div>
            <div style="margin-bottom: 8px;">
                <strong style="color: #daa520;">2.</strong> 在命令中填写 <code style="color: #daa520;">target:</code> 和 <code style="color: #daa520;">buyer_name:</code>（买家的Discord用户名和游戏内名字,前者交易用，后者用于写入NPC事件历史）
            </div>
            <div style="margin-bottom: 8px;">
                <strong style="color: #daa520;">3.</strong> 前往Discord的Bot频道粘贴并发送命令
            </div>
            <div>
                <strong style="color: #daa520;">4.</strong> Bot会生成交易码，分享给买家确认
            </div>
        ` : `
            <div style="margin-bottom: 8px;">
                <strong style="color: #daa520;">1.</strong> 点击下方按钮复制交易命令
            </div>
            <div style="margin-bottom: 8px;">
                <strong style="color: #daa520;">2.</strong> 在命令中填写 <code style="color: #daa520;">target:</code>（买家的Discord用户名）
            </div>
            <div style="margin-bottom: 8px;">
                <strong style="color: #daa520;">3.</strong> 前往Discord的Bot频道粘贴并发送命令
            </div>
            <div>
                <strong style="color: #daa520;">4.</strong> Bot会生成交易码，买家确认后进行交易
            </div>
        `;
        
        modal.innerHTML = `
            <div class="modal-content" style="max-width: 650px; width: 90%;">
                <div class="modal-header">
                    <h2 class="modal-title">📤 发起交易</h2>
                    <button class="modal-close-btn" onclick="this.closest('.modal-overlay').remove()">×</button>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-body" style="padding: 25px;">
                    <!-- ${itemTypeText}信息 -->
                    <div style="background: rgba(139, 69, 19, 0.15); padding: 15px; border-radius: 8px; margin-bottom: 20px; border: 1px solid rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);">
                        <div style="font-size: 16px; color: #d2b48c; margin-bottom: 8px; font-weight: bold;">
                            ${itemName}
                        </div>
                        <div style="font-size: 13px; color: #a09c91; margin-bottom: 5px;">
                            <strong style="color: #d2b48c;">${isNpc ? '序列' : '等阶'}:</strong> ${formattedTier}
                        </div>
                        <div style="font-size: 12px; color: #a09c91; font-style: italic;">
                            ${description}
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <!-- 步骤说明 -->
                    <div style="margin-bottom: 20px;">
                        <div style="font-size: 14px; color: #d2b48c; margin-bottom: 12px; font-weight: bold;">
                            📋 交易步骤：
                        </div>
                        <div style="font-size: 13px; color: #a09c91; line-height: 1.8; padding-left: 10px;">
                            ${stepsHtml}
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <!-- 命令框 -->
                    <div style="margin-bottom: 20px;">
                        <div style="font-size: 13px; color: #d2b48c; margin-bottom: 8px;">
                            Discord Bot 命令：
                        </div>
                        <div style="background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); padding: 15px; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid #5a3d2b; position: relative;">
                            <code id="trade-command-text" style="color: #daa520; font-size: 13px; word-break: break-all; display: block; line-height: 1.6;">
                                ${command}
                            </code>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <!-- 操作按钮 -->
                    <div style="display: flex; gap: 12px; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 15px;">
                        <button id="copy-trade-command-btn" class="interaction-btn" style="padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 14px; background: #1a5f7a; flex: 1; max-width: 200px;">
                            📋 复制命令
                        </button>
                        <a href="https://discord.com/channels/1456496749022806193/1456496750490554462" target="_blank" 
                           class="interaction-btn" 
                           style="padding: 12px 24px; font-size: 14px; background: #5865F2; text-decoration: none; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex: 1; max-width: 200px;">
                            🤖 前往Bot频道
                        </a>
                    </div>
                    
                    <!-- 提示信息 -->
                    <div style="background: rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.1); padding: 12px; border-radius: 6px; border-left: 3px solid #daa520;">
                        <div style="font-size: 12px; color: #a09c91; line-height: 1.6;">
                            <strong style="color: #daa520;">💡 提示：</strong><br/>
                            • 交易前请与买家确认好价格和交易内容<br/>
                            • 可以在 <a href="https://discord.com/channels/1456496749022806193/1465255444422328437" target="_blank" style="color: #5865F2;">Discord交易区</a> 寻找交易对象<br/>
                            • ${isNpc ? '交易完成后会克隆该人物发送给买家（你仍保留原人物）' : '交易完成后物品将从你的背包中移除'}
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        `;
        
        document.body.appendChild(modal);
        
        // 绑定复制按钮事件
        const copyBtn = modal.querySelector('#copy-trade-command-btn');
        copyBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            const commandText = modal.querySelector('#trade-command-text').textContent.trim();
            navigator.clipboard.writeText(commandText).then(() => {
                copyBtn.textContent = '✅ 已复制！';
                copyBtn.style.background = '#4caf50';
                setTimeout(() => {
                    copyBtn.textContent = '📋 复制命令';
                    copyBtn.style.background = '#1a5f7a';
                }, 2000);
            }).catch(err => {
                console.error('复制失败:', err);
                this.showTemporaryMessage('复制失败，请手动复制命令');
            });
        });
        
        // 点击背景关闭
        modal.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
            if (e.target === modal) {
                modal.remove();
            }
        });
    },
    
    // 显示交易教程/帮助信息
    showTradeHelper() {
        const modal = document.createElement('div');
        modal.className = 'modal-overlay';
        modal.style.display = 'flex';
        modal.style.zIndex = '10001';
        
        modal.innerHTML = `
            <div class="modal-content" style="max-width: 700px; width: 90%;">
                <div class="modal-header">
                    <h2 class="modal-title">❓ 交易功能教程</h2>
                    <button class="modal-close-btn" onclick="this.closest('.modal-overlay').remove()">×</button>
                </div>
                <div class="modal-body" style="padding: 25px;">
                    <!-- 功能介绍 -->
                    <div style="background: rgba(139, 69, 19, 0.15); padding: 15px; border-radius: 8px; margin-bottom: 20px; border: 1px solid rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);">
                        <div style="font-size: 15px; color: #d2b48c; margin-bottom: 10px; font-weight: bold;">
                            🔄 什么是交易功能？
                        </div>
                        <div style="font-size: 13px; color: #a09c91; line-height: 1.8;">
                            交易功能允许玩家之间通过Discord Bot进行物品和NPC的交易。系统会通过游戏内邮件自动处理物品的增删，确保交易安全可靠。
                        </div>
                    </div>

    renderTooltipContent(item) {
    // --- 核心修正：使用中文键名，支持品阶和序列字段 --- 
    const tier = this.SafeGetValue(item, ['品阶', '序列'], '普通');
    // 如果tier是纯数字（如"3"），转换为"序列3"格式
    const formattedTier = (!isNaN(tier) && tier !== '普通') ? `序列${tier}` : tier;
    const tierStyle = this.getTierStyle(formattedTier);
    const level = this.SafeGetValue(item, '等级', '');
    const tierDisplay = level ? `${formattedTier} ${level}` : formattedTier;

    let attributesHtml = '';
    const attributes = item.attributes_bonus;
    if (typeof attributes === 'object' && attributes !== null && Object.keys(attributes).length > 0) {
        attributesHtml += `<div class="tooltip-section-title">固定加成</div>`;
        for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(attributes)) {
            attributesHtml += `<p><strong>${key}:</strong> ${value > 0 ? '+' : ''}${value}</p>`;
        }
    }

    const percentBonuses = item['百分比加成'];
    if (typeof percentBonuses === 'object' && percentBonuses !== null && Object.keys(percentBonuses).length > 0) {
        attributesHtml += `<div class="tooltip-section-title" style="margin-top: 5px;">百分比加成</div>`;
        for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(percentBonuses)) {
           attributesHtml += `<p><strong>${key}:</strong> +${value}</p>`;
        }
    }

    let effectsHtml = '';
    const effects = item.special_effects;
    if (Array.isArray(effects) && effects.length > 0) {
        effectsHtml += `<div class="tooltip-section-title">特殊效果</div>`;
        effectsHtml += effects.filter(eff => eff !== '$__META_EXTENSIBLE__$').map(eff => `<p>${eff}</p>`).join('');
    }

    return `
        <div class="tooltip-title" style="${tierStyle}">${this.SafeGetValue(item, '名称')}</div>
        <p><strong>等级:</strong> ${tierDisplay}</p>
        <p><i>${this.SafeGetValue(item, '描述', '无描述')}</i></p>
        ${attributesHtml ? `<div class="tooltip-section tooltip-attributes">${attributesHtml}</div>` : ''}
        ${effectsHtml ? `<div class="tooltip-section">${effectsHtml}</div>` : ''}
    `;
    // --- 修正结束 ---
    },

    howEquipmentTooltip(element, event) {
            const tooltip = document.getElementById('equipment-tooltip');
            const itemDataString = element.dataset.itemDetails;
            if (!tooltip || !itemDataString) return;
            try {
              const item = JSON.parse(itemDataString);
              tooltip.innerHTML = this.renderTooltipContent(item);
              tooltip.style.display = 'block';
              const tooltipRect = tooltip.getBoundingClientRect();
              const viewportWidth = window.innerWidth;
              const viewportHeight = window.innerHeight;
              let left = event.pageX + 15;
              let top = event.pageY + 15;
              if (left + tooltipRect.width > viewportWidth) {
                left = event.pageX - tooltipRect.width - 15;
              }
              if (top + tooltipRect.height > viewportHeight) {
                top = event.pageY - tooltipRect.height - 15;
              }
              tooltip.style.left = `${left}px`;
              tooltip.style.top = `${top}px`;
            } catch (e) {
              console.error('解析装备Tooltip数据失败:', e);
            }
    },

    showEquipmentTooltip(element, event) {
            const tooltip = document.getElementById('equipment-tooltip');
            const itemDataString = element.dataset.itemDetails;
            if (!tooltip || !itemDataString) return;
            try {
              const item = JSON.parse(itemDataString);
              tooltip.innerHTML = this.renderTooltipContent(item);
              tooltip.style.display = 'block';
              const tooltipRect = tooltip.getBoundingClientRect();
              const viewportWidth = window.innerWidth;
              const viewportHeight = window.innerHeight;
              let left = event.pageX + 15;
              let top = event.pageY + 15;
              if (left + tooltipRect.width > viewportWidth) {
                left = event.pageX - tooltipRect.width - 15;
              }
              if (top + tooltipRect.height > viewportHeight) {
                top = event.pageY - tooltipRect.height - 15;
              }
              tooltip.style.left = `${left}px`;
              tooltip.style.top = `${top}px`;
            } catch (e) {
              console.error('解析装备Tooltip数据失败:', e);
            }
          },

    hideEquipmentTooltip() {
            const tooltip = document.getElementById('equipment-tooltip');
            if (tooltip) tooltip.style.display = 'none';
    },

    // 切换物品栏项目的展开/折叠状态
    toggleInventoryItem(headerElement) {
        const itemElement = headerElement.closest('.inventory-item');
        if (itemElement) {
            itemElement.classList.toggle('expanded');
        }

    toggleRelationshipItem(headerElement) {
