    const codeInput = document.getElementById('cloud-download-code-input');
    const code = codeInput.value.trim().toUpperCase();
    
    if (!/^[A-Z0-9]{8}$/.test(code)) {
        this.showTemporaryMessage('请输入有效的8位编码');
        return;
    }
    
    this.showTemporaryMessage('正在查询云存档...');
    
    try {
        const response = await fetch(`${this.CLOUD_SAVE_SERVER}/api/save/info/${code}`);
        const result = await response.json();
        
        if (result.success) {
            const preview = document.getElementById('cloud-download-preview');
            document.getElementById('cloud-preview-name').textContent = result.data.saveName;
            document.getElementById('cloud-preview-time').textContent = new Date(result.data.createdAt).toLocaleString('zh-CN');
            document.getElementById('cloud-preview-count').textContent = `${result.data.accessCount} 次`;
            preview.style.display = 'block';
            document.getElementById('btn-cloud-download-confirm').disabled = false;
            this.pendingCloudCode = code;
            this.showTemporaryMessage('找到云存档！');
        } else {
            document.getElementById('cloud-download-preview').style.display = 'none';
            document.getElementById('btn-cloud-download-confirm').disabled = true;
            this.showTemporaryMessage(`未找到该编码的存档`);
        }
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('查询云存档错误:', error);
        this.showTemporaryMessage('查询失败，请检查网络连接');
    }
},

async downloadCloudSave() {
    if (!this.pendingCloudCode) {
        this.showTemporaryMessage('请先查询云存档');
        return;
    }
    
    this.showTemporaryMessage('正在下载云存档...');
    
    try {
        const url = `${this.CLOUD_SAVE_SERVER}/api/save/download/${this.pendingCloudCode}`;
        const response = await fetch(url);
        
        if (!response.ok) {
            this.showTemporaryMessage(`下载失败: HTTP ${response.status}`, 3000);
            return;
        }
        
        const result = await response.json();
        
        if (result.success) {
            const cloudSaveData = result.data.saveData;
            
            // 获取所有存档
            const allSaves = await this.getSavesFromStorage();
            
            // 生成新槽位ID (必须以slot_开头才能显示在列表中)
            const slotId = `slot_cloud_${this.pendingCloudCode}`;
            
            // 设置存档信息
            cloudSaveData.save_name = `[云] ${result.data.saveName}`;
            cloudSaveData.saved_at = new Date().toISOString();
            cloudSaveData.cloud_code = this.pendingCloudCode;
            
            // 保存到新槽位
            allSaves[slotId] = cloudSaveData;
            await AppStorage.saveData('multi_save_data', allSaves);
            
            // 关闭下载模态框
            const modal = document.getElementById('cloud-download-modal');
            if (modal) modal.style.display = 'none';
            
            this.showTemporaryMessage(`云存档 "${result.data.saveName}" 导入成功！`, 3000);
            
            // 刷新存档管理界面
            await this.showSaveLoadManager();
        } else {
            this.showTemporaryMessage(`下载失败: ${result.error}`, 3000);
        }
    } catch (error) {
        this.showTemporaryMessage(`下载错误: ${error.message}`, 3000);
    }
},
// ==================== 云存档系统结束 ====================

async performImportOverwrite(slotId) {
 if (!this.importedSaveData) {
 this.showTemporaryMessage('没有暂存的导入数据。');
 return;
 }

 const allSaves = await this.getSavesFromStorage();
 const existingSave = allSaves[slotId];

 const confirmMessage = existingSave
 ? `确定要用导入的存档 “${this.importedSaveData.save_name}” 覆盖现有存档 “${existingSave.save_name}” 吗？`
 : `确定要将存档 “${this.importedSaveData.save_name}” 导入到这个空槽位吗？`;

 this.showCustomConfirm(confirmMessage, async () => {
 this.showTemporaryMessage('正在导入存档...');
 try {
 // 如果覆盖的是一个已有存档，先删除它关联的旧世界书备份
 if (existingSave) {
 await this.deleteLorebookBackup(existingSave);
 }

 const importedData = _.cloneDeep(this.importedSaveData);

 // 关键：将导入的存档数据写入选定的槽位
 allSaves[slotId] = importedData;
 await AppStorage.saveData('multi_save_data', allSaves);

 this.showTemporaryMessage('存档导入成功！');
 this.importedSaveData = null; // 清除临时数据
 this.showSaveLoadManager(); // 刷新存档管理器界面
 } catch (error) {
 console.error('执行导入覆盖时出错:', error);
 this.showTemporaryMessage(`导入失败: ${error.message}`);
 }
 });
 },
   async clearAllSaves() {
        this.showCustomConfirm('【高危操作】确定要删除所有手动存档吗？此操作无法恢复。', async () => {
            this.showTemporaryMessage('正在清除所有存档...');
            try {
                // 【核心修复】不再删除整个存档对象，而是将其重置为空对象{}
                await AppStorage.saveData('multi_save_data', {});
                
                this.showTemporaryMessage('所有手动存档已成功清除。');
                this.showSaveLoadManager(); // 重新渲染存档界面
            } catch (error) {
                console.error('清除所有存档时出错:', error);
                this.showTemporaryMessage(`清除失败: ${error.message}`);
            }
        });
    },
       async _migrateSaveData(saveData) {
    // 检查是否为需要迁移的旧版存档 (有 message_content 但没有 timeline_history)
    if (saveData && saveData.message_content && !saveData.timeline_history) {
        console.log(`[存档迁移] 检测到旧版存档 “${saveData.save_name}”，正在进行转换...`);

        const newTimelineSave = {
            timestamp: saveData.timestamp,
            save_name: `${saveData.save_name} (旧版转换)`,
            timeline_history: [{
                message_id: `migrated-hist-${Date.now()}`,
                message: saveData.message_content,
                is_user: false,
                role: 'assistant',
                data: {
                    ..._.cloneDeep(saveData.mvu_data),
                    equipped_items: _.cloneDeep(saveData.equipped_items),
                    gacha_data: _.cloneDeep(saveData.gacha_data)
                },
                timestamp: new Date(saveData.timestamp).getTime()
            }],
            snapshot_data: {
                gacha_data: _.cloneDeep(saveData.gacha_data),
                lorebook_content: {} 
            }
        };

        // 尝试从旧存档信息中恢复世界书内容
        if (saveData.lorebook_entries && saveData.lorebook_entries.journey_entry_name) {
            try {
                const bookName = '1源堡';
                const allEntries = await TavernHelper.getLorebookEntries(bookName);
                const backupEntry = allEntries.find(e => e.comment === saveData.lorebook_entries.journey_entry_name);
                if (backupEntry) {
                    newTimelineSave.snapshot_data.lorebook_content.journey = backupEntry.content;
                    console.log('[存档迁移] 已成功从世界书备份中恢复“本周目经历”。');
                }
            } catch(e) {
                console.error('[存档迁移] 尝试恢复世界书时出错:', e);
            }
        }

        return newTimelineSave; // 返回转换后的新格式存档
    }
    
    return saveData; // 如果不是旧版，直接返回原存档
},
               async handleFileImport(event) {
    const file = event.target.files[0];
    if (!file) return;

    this.showTemporaryMessage('正在导入存档...', 3000);
    const reader = new FileReader();

    reader.onload = async (e) => {
        try {
            const importData = JSON.parse(e.target.result);

            if (importData.exportVersion !== '1.0' || !importData.saveData) {
                throw new Error('存档文件格式无效或已损坏。');
            }

            // 【核心修改】在处理导入数据前，先通过迁移函数进行转换
            const migratedSaveData = await this._migrateSaveData(importData.saveData);

            const allSaves = await this.getSavesFromStorage();
            const newSlotId = `slot_${Date.now()}`; // 使用动态ID，不再受5个槽位限制

            const bookName = '1源堡';
            const currentEntries = await TavernHelper.getLorebookEntries(bookName);
            const currentEntryNames = new Set(currentEntries.map(entry => entry.comment));
            
            const newSaveData = _.cloneDeep(migratedSaveData);
            const entriesToCreate = [];

            if (Array.isArray(importData.lorebookData)) {
                for (const entryToImport of importData.lorebookData) {
                    let newEntryName = entryToImport.comment;
                    let originalEntryName = entryToImport.comment;

                    if (currentEntryNames.has(newEntryName)) {
                        newEntryName = `${newEntryName}_imported_${Date.now()}`;
                        this.showTemporaryMessage(`世界书条目“${originalEntryName}”已存在，重命名为“${newEntryName}”`, 4000);
                    }
                    
                    const newEntry = { ...entryToImport };
                    delete newEntry.uid;
                    newEntry.comment = newEntryName;
                    newEntry.keys = [newEntryName];
                    newEntry.enabled = false;
                    entriesToCreate.push(newEntry);

                    if (newSaveData.lorebook_entries) {
                        for (const key in newSaveData.lorebook_entries) {
                            if (newSaveData.lorebook_entries[key] === originalEntryName) {
                                newSaveData.lorebook_entries[key] = newEntryName;
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            if (entriesToCreate.length > 0) {
                await TavernHelper.createLorebookEntries(bookName, entriesToCreate);
            }

            newSaveData.save_name = `${newSaveData.save_name} (导入)`;
            allSaves[newSlotId] = newSaveData;
            await AppStorage.saveData('multi_save_data', allSaves);

            this.showTemporaryMessage(`存档已成功导入！`);
            this.showSaveLoadManager();

        } catch (error) {
            console.error('导入存档时出错:', error);
            this.showTemporaryMessage(`导入失败: ${error.message}`);
        } finally {
            event.target.value = '';
        }
    };

    reader.readAsText(file);
},

     async performImportOverwrite(slotId) {
    if (!this.importedSaveData) {
        this.showTemporaryMessage('没有暂存的导入数据。');
        return;
    }

    const allSaves = await this.getSavesFromStorage();
    const existingSave = allSaves[slotId];

    const confirmMessage = existingSave
        ? `确定要用导入的存档 “${this.importedSaveData.save_name}” 覆盖现有存档 “${existingSave.save_name}” 吗？`
        : `确定要将存档 “${this.importedSaveData.save_name}” 导入到这个空槽位吗？`;

    this.showCustomConfirm(confirmMessage, async () => {
        this.showTemporaryMessage('正在写入存档数据...');
        try {
            // 如果是覆盖，先删除旧存档关联的世界书备份
            if (existingSave) {
                await this.deleteLorebookBackup(existingSave);
            }

            const importedData = _.cloneDeep(this.importedSaveData);
            allSaves[slotId] = importedData;
            await AppStorage.saveData('multi_save_data', allSaves);

            this.importedSaveData = null; // 清除临时数据
            this.showTemporaryMessage('存档导入成功！');

            // 【核心修正】使用微小的延迟来刷新UI，避免竞争条件
            setTimeout(() => {
                this.showSaveLoadManager();
            }, 50);

        } catch (error) {
            console.error('执行导入覆盖时出错:', error);
            this.showTemporaryMessage(`导入失败: ${error.message}`);
        }
    });
},

      async promptForSaveName(defaultName) {
              return new Promise((resolve) => {
                  const existingModal = document.getElementById('save-name-prompt-modal');
                  if(existingModal) existingModal.remove();

                  const modal = document.createElement('div');
                  modal.id = 'save-name-prompt-modal';
                  modal.className = 'modal-overlay';
                  modal.style.display = 'flex';
                  modal.style.zIndex = '2000'; 
                  modal.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="modal-content" style="width: 500px; height: auto; max-height: none;">
                      <div class="modal-header"><h2 class="modal-title">设置存档名称</h2></div>
                      <div class="modal-body" style="padding: 20px;">
                        <p style="margin-bottom: 15px; color: #d2b48c;">为您的存档输入一个名称（留空则使用默认名称）：</p>
                        
                        <input type="text" id="save-name-input" value="" placeholder="${defaultName}" 
                               style="width: 100%; padding: 10px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5); border: 1px solid #a09c91; color: #f5deb3; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 14px; margin-bottom: 10px;">
                        <div style="font-size:11px; color:#a09c91;">
                          <p>将创建以下世界书备份条目：</p>
                          <ul style="list-style-position: inside; padding-left: 10px;">
                            <li id="preview-journey">${defaultName}-本周目经历</li>
                            <li id="preview-past-lives">${defaultName}-历史的投影</li>
                          </ul>
                        </div>
                        <div style="display: flex; gap: 10px; justify-content: flex-end; margin-top: 20px;">
                          <button id="save-name-cancel" class="interaction-btn">取消</button>
                          <button id="save-name-confirm" class="interaction-btn primary-btn">确认存档</button>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  `;
                  document.querySelector('.guixu-root-container').appendChild(modal);
                  
                  const input = modal.querySelector('#save-name-input');
                  const confirmBtn = modal.querySelector('#save-name-confirm');
                  const cancelBtn = modal.querySelector('#save-name-cancel');
                  const previewJourney = modal.querySelector('#preview-journey');
                  const previewPastLives = modal.querySelector('#preview-past-lives');

                  // 核心修改2：当输入框为空时，预览也使用默认名
                  input.addEventListener('input', () => {
                    const name = input.value.trim() || defaultName;
                    if (previewJourney) previewJourney.textContent = `${name}-本周目经历`;
                    if (previewPastLives) previewPastLives.textContent = `${name}-历史的投影`;
                  });
                  
                  // 核心修改3：如果用户输入为空，则使用默认名进行保存
                  confirmBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
                    const userInput = input.value.trim();
                    const finalSaveName = userInput || defaultName;
                    modal.remove();
                    resolve(finalSaveName);
                  });
                  
                  cancelBtn.addEventListener('click', () => { modal.remove(); resolve(null); });
                  input.addEventListener('keypress', (e) => { if (e.key === 'Enter') confirmBtn.click(); });
                  setTimeout(() => input.focus(), 100);
              });
          },
    // --- 新增：流式处理函数 ---
handleStreamUpdate(text) {
    // 首次收到流式内容时，只隐藏全屏加载动画，保留加载条
    if (this.isBusy && text && text.trim().length > 0) {
        // 使用标志位确保只隐藏一次
        if (!this._streamLoadingHidden) {
            this._streamLoadingHidden = true;
            console.log('[handleStreamUpdate] 首次收到流式内容，隐藏全屏加载动画，保留加载条');
            
            // 如果开启了全屏加载动画，只隐藏overlay，不隐藏加载条
            if (this.isFullScreenLoadingEnabled) {
                const overlay = document.getElementById('loading-overlay');
                if (overlay) {
                    overlay.style.opacity = '0';
                    overlay.style.display = 'none';
                    console.log('[handleStreamUpdate] 全屏加载动画已隐藏');
                }
                // 显示加载条，让用户知道还在生成中
                this.showLoadingBar();
            }
            // 如果没开启全屏加载，加载条本来就在显示，不需要额外操作
        }
    }
    
    // 更新文本显示
    const gameTextDisplay = document.getElementById('game-text-display');
    if (gameTextDisplay) {
        const displayText = this._getDisplayText(text);
        gameTextDisplay.innerHTML = this.formatMessageContent(displayText);
        this.rebindJudgmentInteractions(gameTextDisplay);
        
        // 【性能优化】移除流式传输中的战斗状态检测，改为在流式结束后统一检测
        // 原因：流式传输时频繁检测世界书会导致严重卡顿
        // this.checkBattleStatusAndToggle(displayText).catch(err => {
        //     console.error('[战斗状态检测] 自动切换失败:', err);
        // });
    }
},

// --- 新增：生成结束处理函数 (已集成最终修复方案) ---
// --- 修改：用这个新版本替换掉旧的 handleStreamEnd 函数 ---
 async handleStreamEnd(finalText) {
 console.log('[handleStreamEnd] 函数已进入！finalText:', finalText);

// 🔴 核心过滤：完全避开标签，用3重特征判断
  // 1. 初始化未完成（INITIALIZING）时的事件，大概率是幽灵事件（重载重放）
  const isInitNotDone = window.GuixuInitState !== 'READY';
  // 2. 文本过短（<30字符），不可能包含有效变量更新
  const isTooShort = !finalText || finalText.length < 30;
  // 3. 非新游戏且无实际变量更新指令（用“=”“：”判断，变量更新必然包含赋值符号）
  const hasValidContent = finalText?.includes('=') || finalText?.includes('：') || finalText?.includes(':');
  const isInvalidContent = !this.isTrueNewGame && !hasValidContent;

  // 三个重过滤任意满足一个，就判定为幽灵事件，直接退出
  if (isInitNotDone || isTooShort || isInvalidContent) {
    console.log('[handleStreamEnd] 过滤幽灵事件：', {
      初始化状态: window.GuixuInitState,
      文本长度: finalText?.length,
      是否有有效内容: hasValidContent
    });
    this.hideWaitingMessage();
    this.isBusy = false;
    return;
  }

 if (!finalText) {
 console.log('[handleStreamEnd] 非流场景：finalText为空');
 this.hideWaitingMessage();
 this.isBusy = false;
  console.log('[handleStreamEnd] finalText为空，未修改任何数据，无需回滚');
 this.showTemporaryMessage('AI未返回有效内容，未执行任何操作');
 return;
 }
    // ================= 流程劫持检查站 开始 =================
    if (this.isSummarizing) {
        console.log('[智能总结器] 已劫持生成结果。');
        this.isSummarizing = false; // 立刻重置标记

        try {
            const summaryText = finalText.trim();
            if (!summaryText) {
                throw new Error('AI未能生成有效的摘要内容。');
            }
            
            const outputContainer = document.getElementById('summarizer-output-container');
            const footer = document.getElementById('summarizer-footer');
            if (outputContainer && footer) {
                outputContainer.innerHTML = `<textarea id="summarizer-output">${summaryText}</textarea>`;
                footer.innerHTML = `<button id="btn-write-summary" class="interaction-btn primary-btn">写入核心记忆</button>`;
                
                // 【核心修复2】从“数据中继站”（按钮）上读取暂存的信息
                const generateBtn = document.getElementById('btn-generate-summary');
                const mode = generateBtn.dataset.mode;
                const lastEventId = generateBtn.dataset.lastEventId;

                document.getElementById('btn-write-summary').addEventListener('click', () => 
                    this.writeSummaryToLorebook(mode, lastEventId)
                );
            }
        } catch (e) {
            const outputContainer = document.getElementById('summarizer-output-container');
            if(outputContainer) outputContainer.innerHTML = `<p class="modal-placeholder">生成摘要失败: ${e.message}</p>`;
            document.getElementById('btn-generate-summary').disabled = false;
        }

        return; // 关键：中断后续所有正常的游戏流程！
    }

    if (this.isRefining) {
        console.log('[二次精炼器] 已劫持生成结果。');
        this.isRefining = false; // 立刻重置标记

        try {
            const refinedText = finalText.trim();
            if (!refinedText) {
                throw new Error('AI未能生成有效的精炼内容。');
            }
            
            const outputContainer = document.getElementById('refine-output-container');
            const footer = document.getElementById('refine-footer');
            if (outputContainer && footer) {
                outputContainer.innerHTML = `<textarea id="refine-output">${refinedText}</textarea>`;
                footer.innerHTML = `<button id="btn-write-refine" class="interaction-btn primary-btn">应用精炼内容</button>`;

                document.getElementById('btn-write-refine').addEventListener('click', () => 
                    this.writeRefineToLorebook(refinedText)
                );
            }
        } catch (e) {
            const outputContainer = document.getElementById('refine-output-container');
            if(outputContainer) outputContainer.innerHTML = `<p class="modal-placeholder">生成精炼失败: ${e.message}</p>`;
            document.getElementById('btn-generate-refine').disabled = false;
        }

        return; // 关键：中断后续所有正常的游戏流程！
    }
    // ================= 流程劫持检查站 结束 =================

    await this.loadGachaState();
    console.log('[源堡] 传输结束，开始全局净化与最终处理...');
    const cleanedText = finalText.replace(/<safe>[\s\S]*?<\/safe>/g, '');

     // 角色卡生成逻辑 (不变)
    if (this.pendingCharacterCardGeneration) {
        const charName = this.pendingCharacterCardGeneration;
        const tagName = 'CharacterCard';
        const cardContent = this._extractLastTagContent(tagName, cleanedText);
        if (cardContent) {
            try {
                const bookName = '1源堡';
                const allEntries = await TavernHelper.getLorebookEntries(bookName);
                const targetEntry = allEntries.find(entry => entry.comment === charName);
                if (targetEntry) {
                    await TavernHelper.setLorebookEntries(bookName, [{ uid: targetEntry.uid, content: cardContent }]);
                    this.showTemporaryMessage(`已成功为“${charName}”生成并写入角色卡！`, 3000);
                } else { throw new Error(`未找到名为“${charName}”的世界书条目。`); }
            } catch (error) { this.showTemporaryMessage(`错误：写入“${charName}”的角色卡失败！`, 4000); }
        } else { this.showTemporaryMessage(`警告：AI回复中未找到“${charName}”的角色卡标签，请手动检查。`, 5000); }
        this.pendingCharacterCardGeneration = null;
    }

    
    // 兼容新旧版本：同时清理thinking和reasoning标签
    const textForValidation = cleanedText.replace(/<thinking>[\s\S]*?<\/thinking>/g, '').replace(/<reasoning>[\s\S]*?<\/reasoning>/g, '');
    const validationResult = this.validateAiResponseFormat(textForValidation);

 console.log('[验证] 3.格式检查结果:', validationResult.isValid, '错误信息:', validationResult.errorMessages);
    if (!validationResult.isValid) {
    console.log('[验证] 4.格式检查失败，准备显示模态框', validationResult.errorMessages);
     this.hideWaitingMessage(true);
        const errorListHtml = validationResult.errorMessages.map(e => `<li>${e}</li>`).join('');
        const confirmMessageHtml = 
            `<div style="max-height: 45vh; overflow-y: auto; padding: 10px; margin-bottom: 15px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.2); border-radius: 4px; border: 1px solid rgba(139, 69, 19, 0.3);">` +
            `<p><b>AI回复格式检查失败:</b></p>` +
            `<ul style="margin: 0 0 10px 20px; font-size: 12px; color: #ffb3b3;">${errorListHtml}</ul>` +
            `<p><b>【AI原始回复内容】</b></p>` +
            `<textarea readonly style="width: 98%; height: 200px; background: #1a1a1a; color: #f0f0f0; border: 1px solid #555; font-size: 11px;">${cleanedText.replace(/</g, '<').replace(/>/g, '>')}</textarea>` +
            `</div>` +
            `<p style="text-align: center;">是否要<b>【确认】</b>回退到行动前的状态？<br><span style="font-size:11px; color:#a09c91;">(选择“取消”将尝试自动修复并应用内容)</span></p>`;

    console.log('[验证] 4.模态框HTML已生成:', confirmMessageHtml); 
     this.showCustomConfirm(
            confirmMessageHtml,
            async () => { 
                await this.performRollback(); 
                this.isBusy = false; // 确保在回滚后解锁
            },
            async () => {
                this.showTemporaryMessage('正在尝试自动修复并应用...');
                const fixedText = this._autoFixTags(cleanedText); // 【核心修复】调用修复函数
                await this.processValidResponse(fixedText); // 使用修复后的文本继续流程
            }
        );
    } else {
   console.log('[PC端验证] 格式检查通过，直接执行更新');
     await this.processValidResponse(cleanedText); // 格式正确，直接继续流程
    }
},
 async processValidResponse(responseText) {
  console.log(`%c[处理响应] 开始执行`, 'color: green;');
  // 等待stat_data初始化完成（最多等1秒，避免无限等待）
  const waitForInit = async () => {
    let retry = 0;
    while (!this.isStatInitialized && retry < 10) {
      console.log(`[处理响应] 等待stat_data初始化（${retry}/10）`);
      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 100));
      retry++;
    }
    if (!this.isStatInitialized) {
      console.warn('[处理响应] stat_data初始化超时，使用默认结构');
      this.currentMvuState.stat_data = await this.readInitVarData();
      this.isStatInitialized = true;
    }
  };
  await waitForInit(); // 确保初始化完成后再处理

  try {
    const extractedVar = this._extractLastTagContent('UpdateVariable', responseText, true);
    console.log('[提取结果] extractedVar内容:', extractedVar); 
    let cleanedVar = extractedVar ? extractedVar.replace(/<Analysis>[\s\S]*?<\/Analysis>/gi, '').trim() : '';
    this.lastExtractedVariables = extractedVar ? `__UPDATE_VAR__${extractedVar}` : null;
    await this.loadAndDisplayCurrentScene(responseText);

    let modifiedState = null;
    // 1. 第一步：执行变量更新，拿到新状态（同步操作，优先完成）
    if (extractedVar) {
      try {
        modifiedState = await this._applyUpdateFallback(cleanedVar, this.currentMvuState);
      } catch (e) {
        console.error('[自有代码] 执行失败：', e.message);
      }
    }

      // 2. 第二步：锁定新状态（关键：深克隆，避免引用污染）
    let finalState = null;
    if (modifiedState) {
      finalState = _.cloneDeep(modifiedState); // 锁定变量更新后的新值
      console.log('[变量更新完成] 锁定的新状态：', finalState.stat_data);
    } else {
      finalState = _.cloneDeep(this.currentMvuState); // 无更新则用当前状态
    }

    // 3. 第三步：异步补充序列能力（基于锁定的新状态，避免覆盖）
    finalState = await this.updateAcquiredAbilities(finalState);
    console.log('[能力更新完成] 最终状态：', finalState.stat_data);

    // 4. 第四步：将最终状态赋值给全局变量（仅这一次赋值，无多次覆盖）
    this.currentMvuState = _.cloneDeep(finalState);
    console.log('[全局状态锁定] currentMvuState最终值：', this.currentMvuState.stat_data);

    // 5. 渲染UI（基于最终状态，不会回滚）
    this.renderUI(_.cloneDeep(this.currentMvuState.stat_data));
    console.log('[赋值成功] 即将渲染UI！');

    // 6. 渲染变量面板（无副作用）
        if (cleanedVar) {
          const savedErrors = [...this.errorCommands];
          const { patchCommands, formattedPatchText } = this._processJsonPatchCommandsEnhanced(cleanedVar);
          this.errorCommands = savedErrors;
          this.renderVariablePanel(patchCommands, formattedPatchText, cleanedVar);
        }

    // 7. 第五步：执行所有异步存储/同步（基于最终状态，无覆盖）
    if (!this.isTrueNewGame) { 
      // 后续回合逻辑：仅读取finalState，不修改
      const messages = await getChatMessages('0');
      if (messages?.[0]) {
        const messageZero = messages[0];
        messageZero.message = responseText;
        
        // 从finalState中移除equipped_items，避免重复
        const stateWithoutEquipment = _.cloneDeep(finalState);
        if (stateWithoutEquipment.data) {
          delete stateWithoutEquipment.data.equipped_items;
        }
        
        stateWithoutEquipment.data = stateWithoutEquipment.data || {};
        stateWithoutEquipment.data.equipped_items = _.cloneDeep(this.equippedItems);
        messageZero.data = stateWithoutEquipment;
        await TavernHelper.setChatMessages([messageZero], { refresh: 'force' });
      }

      // 角色/缓存/UI更新（仅后续回合执行）
      if (this.pendingCompanionJoin) {
        this.gachaState.activeCompanions.push(this.pendingCompanionJoin);
        this.saveGachaState();
        this.pendingCompanionJoin = null;
      }
      if (this.isAutoWriteEnabled) {
        if (this.lastExtractedJourney) await this.writeJourneyToLorebook(true);
        if (this.lastExtractedPastLives) await this.writePastLivesToLorebook(true);
      }
      if (this.isNovelModeEnabled && this.lastExtractedNovelText) {
        await this.writeNovelModeToLorebook(true);
      }

      // 【整合】星界之尘+剧场点数 自动增长（基于finalState仅后续回合执行）
      const textTotalLength = (this.lastUserMessage || '').length + responseText.length;
      // 星界之尘：每250字符1点（原有逻辑）
      const dustEarned = Math.floor(textTotalLength / 250);
      // 剧场点数：每2000字符1点（比例更低，体现高维资源稀有性）
      const theaterPointsEarned = Math.floor(textTotalLength / 2000);

      // 统一更新状态+合并提示
      if (dustEarned > 0 || theaterPointsEarned > 0) {
        let messageParts = [];
        // 星界之尘更新
        if (dustEarned > 0) {
          this.gachaState.astralDust += dustEarned;
          this.saveGachaState();
          this.renderSummonTab();
          messageParts.push(`获得 ${dustEarned} 星界之尘`);
        }
        // 剧场点数更新
        if (theaterPointsEarned > 0) {
          finalState.stat_data["剧场点数"] = (finalState.stat_data["剧场点数"] || 0) + theaterPointsEarned;
          this.currentMvuState.stat_data["剧场点数"] = finalState.stat_data["剧场点数"];
          this.syncTheaterPoints();
          messageParts.push(`获得 ${theaterPointsEarned} 剧场点数`);
        }
        // 合并提示（一次弹窗）
        this.showTemporaryMessage(`灵性与高维剧场正在回响... ${messageParts.join('，')}`, 1500);
      }

      this.lastUserMessage = '';
      await this.performAutoSave();
      await this.checkForSummaryReminder();
    } else {
      // 第一回合专属逻辑（基于finalState）
      console.log('[第一回合同步前] 最终状态当前序列：', finalState.stat_data['当前序列']);
      this.chatHistoryCache[0].data = _.cloneDeep(finalState);
      await AppStorage.saveData(this._getHistoryKey(), this.chatHistoryCache);
      try {
        const messages = await getChatMessages('0');
        if (messages && messages.length > 0) {
          const messageZero = messages[0];
          messageZero.data.stat_data = _.cloneDeep(finalState.stat_data);
          await TavernHelper.setChatMessages([messageZero], { refresh: 'force' });
          console.log('[第一回合] 已同步 stat_data 到 messages[0]');
        }
      } catch (e) {
        console.warn('[第一回合] 同步到变量管理器数据源失败:', e);
      }
    }

    // 清理+关闭模态框（通用逻辑，都执行）
    const input = document.getElementById('quick-send-input');
    if (input) input.value = '';
    this.pendingActions = [];
    this.savePendingActions();
    this.closeAllModals();

  } catch (error) {
    this.showTemporaryMessage(`处理响应失败: ${error.message}\n${error.stack || '无堆栈信息'}`);
  console.log(`处理响应失败: ${error.message.slice(0, 50)}`);
 } finally {
    this.hideWaitingMessage();
    this.isBusy = false;
    const isNewGame = this.isTrueNewGame;
    if (!isNewGame && !this.isTrueNewGame) {
      await this._finalizeTurn(responseText); // 基于最终状态生成快照
     }
      this.isTrueNewGame = false;
    
    // 最终版：针对真正的滚动容器 .main-content 的平滑回顶
    // 【修复】延迟时间增加到800ms，确保判定美化等异步渲染完成后再滚动
    setTimeout(() => {
        // 安全措施 1: 强制失焦，防止输入框抢夺视口
        if (document.activeElement instanceof HTMLElement) {
            document.activeElement.blur();
        }

        // 明确目标：查找真正的滚动容器
        // 桌面模式：.main-content 是滚动容器
        // 移动端模式：.game-container 是滚动容器
        let scrollableContainer = document.querySelector('.mobile-view .game-container');
        if (!scrollableContainer) {
            scrollableContainer = document.querySelector('.main-content');
        }

        if (scrollableContainer) {
            // 【修复】移除滚动条检查，直接执行滚动（因为内容可能正在异步渲染中）
            console.log('[回顶] 尝试滚动，scrollHeight:', scrollableContainer.scrollHeight, 'clientHeight:', scrollableContainer.clientHeight);
            
            // --- 核心操作：在正确的目标上执行平滑滚动 ---
            scrollableContainer.scrollTo({
                top: 0,
                behavior: 'smooth'
            });

            console.log('[回顶] 已对滚动容器执行了平滑滚动。', scrollableContainer.className);
        } else {
            console.error('[回顶] 致命错误：未能找到目标滚动容器！');
            // 在找不到核心容器时，执行备用方案，以防万一
            window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
        }

    }, 800); // 【修复】增加延迟到800ms，等待判定美化等异步渲染完成

    }
},


insertVariablePanel() {
  // 找到AI回复展示区（#game-text-display）
  const isMobile = /Mobi|Android|iPhone/i.test(navigator.userAgent);
  const insertDelay = isMobile ? 300 : 100; // 插入延迟（之前有效）
  const bindDelay = isMobile ? 100 : 0; // 绑定延迟（手机端多等100ms解析按钮）
  this.isVariablePanelInitializing = true;
  setTimeout(() => {
    const gameTextDisplay = document.getElementById('game-text-display');
    if (!gameTextDisplay) {
      console.warn('未找到游戏文本展示区，面板未插入');
      return;
    }

  // 面板HTML（保留原始功能，适配现有样式）
  const panelHtml = `
    <div id="variable-panel" style="border: 1px solid #666; border-radius: 4px; padding: 10px; margin: 10px 0; display: none; background: #1a1a1a;">
      <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 8px;">
        <h4 style="margin: 0; color: #daa520; font-size: 14px;">本轮AI变量已更新（如果没有变量更新错误，请忽略！）</h4>
        <span id="error-count" style="color: #ff6b6b; font-size: 12px;"></span>
      </div>
      <!-- 原始指令编辑区 -->
      <div style="margin-bottom: 10px;">
        <label style="font-size: 12px; color: #aaa; display: block; margin-bottom: 4px;">原始指令（请只保留更新错误的变量进行更新，以防已更新的变量二次作用）：</label>
        <textarea id="raw-commands" style="width: 100%; min-height: 120px; background: #2a2a2a; color: #f0f0f0; border: 1px solid #555; padding: 6px; font-family: monospace; font-size: 12px; resize: vertical;"></textarea>
      </div>
      <!-- 错误提示区 -->
      <div id="command-errors" style="margin-bottom: 10px; padding: 6px; background: #331a1a; border-radius: 3px; display: none; border: 1px solid #5c2b2b;">
        <div style="font-size: 12px; color: #ff6b6b; margin-bottom: 4px;">检测到AI更新错误（AI流口水了）：</div>
        <ul id="error-list" style="margin: 0; padding-left: 20px; font-size: 12px; color: #ffb3b3;"></ul>
      </div>
      <!-- 操作按钮 -->
      <div style="display: flex; gap: 10px; justify-content: flex-end;">
        <button id="ignore-variables" class="interaction-btn" style="padding: 4px 12px; font-size: 12px;">
          忽略
        </button>
        <button id="reprocess-variables" class="interaction-btn primary-btn" style="padding: 4px 12px; font-size: 12px;">
          再次应用
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  `;
  // 先移除重复面板（避免多面板冲突）
  const existingPanel = document.getElementById('variable-panel');
  if (existingPanel) existingPanel.remove();

  // 插入到 #game-text-display 下方（紧邻AI回复）
  gameTextDisplay.insertAdjacentHTML('afterend', panelHtml);
  console.log(`面板已插入（延迟${insertDelay}ms），开始绑定事件`);
  // 手机端等按钮解析完成再绑定（一轮只绑定一次）
    setTimeout(() => {
      this.initVariablePanelEvents();
      console.log(`一轮事件绑定完成（额外延迟${bindDelay}ms）`);
      this.isVariablePanelInitializing = false;
    }, bindDelay);
  }, insertDelay); 
},


initVariablePanelEvents() {

  const isMobile = /Mobi|Android|iPhone/i.test(navigator.userAgent);
  const panel = document.getElementById('variable-panel');
  if (!panel) {
    console.warn('变量编辑器事件绑定：未找到面板');
    return;
  }
  const reprocessBtn = panel.querySelector('#reprocess-variables');
  const ignoreBtn = panel.querySelector('#ignore-variables');
  const rawCommandsEl = panel.querySelector('#raw-commands');
  // 重新应用变量
   if (reprocessBtn && rawCommandsEl) {
    reprocessBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
      const editedScript = rawCommandsEl.value.trim();
      if (!editedScript) {
        this.showTemporaryMessage('请输入有效的变量指令');
        return;
      }

    try {
      // 情况1：无错误 + 有新状态 → 成功保存
      const newState = await this._applyUpdateFallback(editedScript, this.currentMvuState);
      const errorCommands = Array.isArray(this.errorCommands) ? this.errorCommands : [];
      if (newState && errorCommands.length === 0) {
        this.currentMvuState = newState;
        const lastSnapshot = this.chatHistoryCache.at(-1);
        if (lastSnapshot) {
          lastSnapshot.data = _.cloneDeep(this.currentMvuState); // 更新最新快照
          await AppStorage.saveData(this._getHistoryKey(), this.chatHistoryCache); // 持久化
          if (isMobile) await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 500));
          console.log('[手动更新] 已保存到最新快照，ID:', lastSnapshot.message_id);
        }
        this.renderUI(this.currentMvuState.stat_data); // 刷新属性显示
        
        this.showTemporaryMessage('变量更新成功并已保存至快照！', 3000);
        panel.style.display = 'none'; // 成功后隐藏
      } 
        else if (errorCommands.length > 0) {
        this.showTemporaryMessage(`发现 ${errorCommands.length} 条错误指令，请修正后重新应用！`, 3000);
        // 直接更新错误显示，不重新渲染整个面板（避免清空errorCommands）
        const errorCountEl = document.getElementById('error-count');
        const errorContainerEl = document.getElementById('command-errors');
        const errorListEl = document.getElementById('error-list');
        
        if (errorCountEl && errorContainerEl && errorListEl) {
          errorCountEl.textContent = `发现 ${errorCommands.length} 处错误`;
          errorListEl.innerHTML = errorCommands.map(err => `<li>${err}</li>`).join('');
          errorContainerEl.style.display = 'block';
        }
      }
        // 情况3：无错误但无新状态 → 提示指令无效
      else {
        this.showTemporaryMessage('未检测到有效状态变更，请确认指令是否正确（如路径不存在、值无变化）', 3000);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      this.showTemporaryMessage(`更新失败: ${error.message}，请修正指令后重试`, 3000);
    }
  });
}
  // 忽略本次更新
  if (ignoreBtn) {
    ignoreBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      panel.style.display = 'none'; // 一轮只隐藏一次
    });
  }
},


          
// 渲染面板：填充原始指令+错误提示（优化后，支持任何时机调用）
renderVariablePanel(patchCommands, formattedPatchText, originalScript) {
  // 异步等待面板插入，再渲染
  const renderAfterInsert = async () => {
    const isMobile = /Mobi|Android|iPhone/i.test(navigator.userAgent);
    const totalWait = isMobile ? 300 + 100 + 50 : 100 + 50; // 插入300+绑定100+缓冲50（手机端）
    let panel = document.getElementById('variable-panel');
    
    // 情况1：面板未找到，先插入（支持任何场景下的调用）
    if (!panel) {
      console.log('面板未找到，触发插入...');
      this.insertVariablePanel(); // 调用插入函数（带100ms延迟）
      
      // 等待总延迟，确保面板+按钮都就绪
      await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, totalWait));
      panel = document.getElementById('variable-panel');
      
      // 极端情况：插入失败，提示用户
      if (!panel) {
        console.error('面板插入失败，无法渲染');
        this.showTemporaryMessage('变量面板加载失败，请重试', 3000);
        return;
      }
    }

    // 情况2：面板已存在，直接获取子元素
    const rawCommandsEl = document.getElementById('raw-commands');
    const errorCountEl = document.getElementById('error-count');
    const errorContainerEl = document.getElementById('command-errors');
    const errorListEl = document.getElementById('error-list');
    
    // 容错：子元素缺失时提示
    if (!rawCommandsEl || !errorCountEl || !errorContainerEl || !errorListEl) {
      console.error('面板子元素缺失');
      return;
    }

    // 填充指令和错误提示
    rawCommandsEl.value = originalScript || '';
    const errorCommands = Array.isArray(this.errorCommands) ? this.errorCommands : [];
    
    
    if (errorCommands.length > 0) {
      errorCountEl.textContent = `发现 ${errorCommands.length} 处错误`;
      errorListEl.innerHTML = errorCommands.map(err => `<li>${err}</li>`).join('');
      errorContainerEl.style.display = 'block';
    } else {
      errorCountEl.textContent = '';
      errorContainerEl.style.display = 'none';
    }

    // 强制显示面板
    panel.style.display = 'block';
    
    // 同步到悬浮编辑器（如果存在且用户未编辑）
    if (floatingEditorInstance && originalScript) {
      const floatingTextarea = document.getElementById('floating-editor-textarea');
      // 仅当悬浮编辑器为空或无未保存更改时自动同步
      if (floatingTextarea && (!floatingTextarea.value.trim() || !floatingEditorInstance.hasUnsavedChanges)) {
        floatingEditorInstance.setCommands(originalScript);
        floatingEditorInstance.hasUnsavedChanges = false; // 自动同步不算未保存更改
        console.log('[变量面板] 已同步指令到悬浮编辑器');
      }
    }
  };

  // 执行渲染逻辑
  renderAfterInsert();
}




          
 };


// ==================== 悬浮变量编辑器 ====================
// 提供随时可访问的变量编辑功能，不受AI回合限制
class FloatingVariableEditor {
  constructor(gameInstance) {
    this.game = gameInstance;
    this.isVisible = false;
    this.isMinimized = false;
    this.position = { x: 20, y: 100 };
    this.buttonPosition = { x: null, y: null }; // 新增：按钮位置
    this.isButtonDragging = false; // 新增：按钮拖动标记
    this.isDragging = false;
    this.dragOffset = { x: 0, y: 0 };
    this.panel = null;
    this.toggleBtn = null;
    this.hasUnsavedChanges = false;
    this.dragListeners = []; // 新增：存储拖动事件监听器，用于动态绑定和解绑
    
    // 状态模型
    this.EditorStateModel = {
      STORAGE_KEY: 'floating-editor-state',
      defaultState: {
        isVisible: false,
        isMinimized: false,
        position: { x: 20, y: 100 },
        buttonPosition: { x: null, y: null } // 新增：保存按钮位置
      },
      serialize: (state) => JSON.stringify(state),
      deserialize: (json) => {
        try {
          return JSON.parse(json);
        } catch {
          return this.EditorStateModel.defaultState;
        }
      }
    };
    
    // 位置约束
    this.PositionConstraints = {
      MIN_MARGIN: 10,
      constrain: (position, panelSize, viewportSize) => {
        return {
          x: Math.max(this.PositionConstraints.MIN_MARGIN, 
             Math.min(position.x, viewportSize.width - panelSize.width - this.PositionConstraints.MIN_MARGIN)),
          y: Math.max(this.PositionConstraints.MIN_MARGIN, 
             Math.min(position.y, viewportSize.height - panelSize.height - this.PositionConstraints.MIN_MARGIN))
        };
      }
    };
  }

//变量编辑器
  // 生成切换按钮HTML

        position: fixed;
        right: 20px;
        bottom: 80px;

        height: 48px;

        cursor: pointer;

        align-items: center;

        ⚙

        width: 360px;

        box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6);

            box-sizing: border-box;
          " placeholder="输入JSON Patch指令，例如：
[{"op":"replace","path":"/当前活力","value":100}]
[{"op":"replace","path":"/人物关系列表/小红/好感度","value":50}]"></textarea>
          
          <!-- 错误显示区 -->
          <div id="floating-editor-errors" style="

          ">
            <div style="font-size: 12px; color: #ff6b6b; margin-bottom: 4px;">检测到错误：</div>
            <ul id="floating-editor-error-list" style="
              margin: 0;
              padding-left: 20px;
              font-size: 12px;
              color: #ffb3b3;
            "></ul>

          <!-- 操作按钮 -->
          <div style="display: flex; gap: 10px; justify-content: flex-end; margin-top: 12px;">

              padding: 6px 12px;

            " title="从原面板同步指令">同步</button>
            <button id="floating-editor-clear" class="interaction-btn" style="
              padding: 6px 12px;
              font-size: 12px;
              background: #333;
              border: 1px solid #555;
              color: #aaa;
            ">清空</button>
            <button id="floating-editor-apply" class="interaction-btn primary-btn" style="
              padding: 6px 12px;
              font-size: 12px;
            ">应用变量</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
  }

  // 初始化
  init() {
    // 加载保存的状态
    this.loadState();
    
    console.log('[FloatingEditor] 开始初始化，将元素插入到body');
    
    // 插入HTML到body（非全屏模式的默认位置）
    document.body.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', this.generateToggleButtonHtml());
    document.body.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', this.generatePanelHtml());
    
    // 获取DOM引用
    this.toggleBtn = document.getElementById('floating-editor-toggle');
    this.panel = document.getElementById('floating-editor-panel');
    
    console.log('[FloatingEditor] 元素已创建:', {
      toggleBtn: this.toggleBtn,
      panel: this.panel,
      toggleBtnParent: this.toggleBtn?.parentElement?.className,
      panelParent: this.panel?.parentElement?.className
    });
    
    // 应用保存的面板位置
    if (this.panel) {
      this.panel.style.left = `${this.position.x}px`;
      this.panel.style.top = `${this.position.y}px`;
    }
    
    // 应用保存的按钮位置（带边界检查）
    if (this.toggleBtn && this.buttonPosition.x !== null && this.buttonPosition.y !== null) {
      const btnSize = 48;
      const maxX = window.innerWidth - btnSize;
      const maxY = window.innerHeight - btnSize;
      
      // 确保按钮在可见范围内
      let x = Math.max(0, Math.min(this.buttonPosition.x, maxX));
      let y = Math.max(0, Math.min(this.buttonPosition.y, maxY));
      
      // 如果保存的位置超出屏幕，使用默认位置
      if (this.buttonPosition.x > maxX || this.buttonPosition.y > maxY) {
        console.warn('[FloatingEditor] 保存的按钮位置超出屏幕范围，使用默认位置');
        this.toggleBtn.style.right = '20px';
        this.toggleBtn.style.bottom = '80px';
        this.toggleBtn.style.left = 'auto';
        this.toggleBtn.style.top = 'auto';
        // 重置保存的位置
        this.buttonPosition = { x: null, y: null };
        this.saveState();
      } else {
        this.toggleBtn.style.left = `${x}px`;
        this.toggleBtn.style.top = `${y}px`;
        this.toggleBtn.style.right = 'auto';
        this.toggleBtn.style.bottom = 'auto';
        console.log('[FloatingEditor] 应用保存的按钮位置:', { x, y });
      }
    } else {
      console.log('[FloatingEditor] 使用默认按钮位置 (right: 20px, bottom: 80px)');
    }
    
    // 绑定事件
    this.bindEvents();
    
    // 恢复可见状态
    if (this.isVisible) {
      this.show();
      if (this.isMinimized) {
        this.minimize();
      }
    }
    
    // 确保元素在正确的容器中（如果当前是全屏模式）
    this.ensureCorrectParent();
    
    console.log('[FloatingEditor] 悬浮变量编辑器初始化完成，按钮应该可见');
  }

  // 切换显示/隐藏
  toggle() {
    this.isVisible = !this.isVisible;
    if (this.isVisible) {
      this.show();
    } else {
      this.hide();
    }
    this.saveState();
  }

  // 显示面板
  show() {
    if (this.panel) {
      this.panel.style.display = 'block';
      this.isVisible = true;
      this.constrainToViewport();
    }
  }

  // 隐藏面板
  hide() {
    if (this.panel) {
      this.panel.style.display = 'none';
      this.isVisible = false;
    }
  }

  // 最小化
  minimize() {
    const content = this.panel?.querySelector('#floating-editor-content');
    const minBtn = this.panel?.querySelector('#floating-editor-minimize');
    if (content && minBtn) {
      content.style.display = 'none';
      minBtn.textContent = '□';
      minBtn.title = '展开';
      this.isMinimized = true;
      this.saveState();
    }
  }

  // 展开
  expand() {
    const content = this.panel?.querySelector('#floating-editor-content');
    const minBtn = this.panel?.querySelector('#floating-editor-minimize');
    if (content && minBtn) {
      content.style.display = 'block';
      minBtn.textContent = '─';
      minBtn.title = '最小化';
      this.isMinimized = false;
      this.saveState();
    }
  }

  // 开始拖拽
  startDrag(e) {
    if (e.target.closest('button') || e.target.closest('textarea')) return;
    
    this.isDragging = true;
    const rect = this.panel.getBoundingClientRect();
    const clientX = e.touches ? e.touches[0].clientX : e.clientX;
    const clientY = e.touches ? e.touches[0].clientY : e.clientY;
    
    this.dragOffset = {
      x: clientX - rect.left,
      y: clientY - rect.top
    };
    
    e.preventDefault();
  }

  // 拖拽中
  onDrag(e) {
    if (!this.isDragging) return;
    
    const clientX = e.touches ? e.touches[0].clientX : e.clientX;
    const clientY = e.touches ? e.touches[0].clientY : e.clientY;
    
    this.position = {
      x: clientX - this.dragOffset.x,
      y: clientY - this.dragOffset.y
    };
    
    this.constrainToViewport();
    
    this.panel.style.left = `${this.position.x}px`;
    this.panel.style.top = `${this.position.y}px`;
  }

  // 结束拖拽
  endDrag() {
    if (this.isDragging) {
      this.isDragging = false;
      this.saveState();
    }
  }

  // 约束到视口内
  constrainToViewport() {
    if (!this.panel) return;
    
    const rect = this.panel.getBoundingClientRect();
    const viewport = {
      width: window.innerWidth,
      height: window.innerHeight
    };
    const panelSize = {
      width: rect.width,
      height: rect.height
    };
    
    this.position = this.PositionConstraints.constrain(this.position, panelSize, viewport);
    this.panel.style.left = `${this.position.x}px`;
    this.panel.style.top = `${this.position.y}px`;
  }

  // 获取指令
  getCommands() {
    const textarea = this.panel?.querySelector('#floating-editor-textarea');
    return textarea?.value || '';
  }

  // 设置指令
  setCommands(commands) {
    const textarea = this.panel?.querySelector('#floating-editor-textarea');
    if (textarea) {
      textarea.value = commands;
      this.hasUnsavedChanges = true;
    }
  }

  // 清空指令
  clearCommands(skipConfirm = false) {
    const textarea = this.panel?.querySelector('#floating-editor-textarea');
    if (!textarea) return;
    
    if (!skipConfirm && textarea.value.trim() && this.hasUnsavedChanges) {
      if (!confirm('确定要清空编辑器内容吗？未应用的更改将丢失。')) {
        return;
      }
    }
    
    textarea.value = '';
    this.hasUnsavedChanges = false;
    this.hideErrors();
  }

  // 从原面板同步
  syncFromPanel() {
    const originalTextarea = document.querySelector('#raw-commands');
    if (originalTextarea && originalTextarea.value.trim()) {
      this.setCommands(originalTextarea.value);
      this.game.showTemporaryMessage('已从原面板同步指令', 2000);
    } else {
      this.game.showTemporaryMessage('原面板无可同步的指令', 2000);
    }
  }

  // 应用指令（支持历史回合编辑）
  async applyCommands() {
    const commands = this.getCommands().trim();
    if (!commands) {
      this.game.showTemporaryMessage('请输入有效的变量指令', 2000);
      return;
    }

    const isMobile = /Mobi|Android|iPhone/i.test(navigator.userAgent);
    
    // 判断是否在历史浏览模式，确定目标快照索引
    const isHistoryMode = this.game.isHistoryViewMode;
    const targetIndex = isHistoryMode 
        ? this.game.historyViewIndex 
        : this.game.chatHistoryCache.length - 1;
    
    // 获取目标快照
    const targetSnapshot = this.game.chatHistoryCache[targetIndex];
    if (!targetSnapshot) {
      this.game.showTemporaryMessage('未找到目标快照', 2000);
      return;
    }
    
    // 使用目标快照的数据作为基础状态
    const baseState = targetSnapshot.data 
        ? _.cloneDeep(targetSnapshot.data) 
        : _.cloneDeep(this.game.currentMvuState);
    
    try {
      const newState = await this.game._applyUpdateFallback(commands, baseState);
      const errorCommands = Array.isArray(this.game.errorCommands) ? this.game.errorCommands : [];
      
      if (newState && errorCommands.length === 0) {
        // 保存到目标快照
        targetSnapshot.data = _.cloneDeep(newState);
        await AppStorage.saveData(this.game._getHistoryKey(), this.game.chatHistoryCache);
        if (isMobile) await new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, 500));
        
        // 如果是当前回合（非历史模式），同步更新currentMvuState
        if (!isHistoryMode) {
          this.game.currentMvuState = newState;
        }
        
        // 刷新UI（使用新状态）
        this.game.renderUI(newState.stat_data);
        
        // 提示信息区分历史/当前
        const msg = isHistoryMode 
            ? `历史回合 ${targetIndex + 1} 的变量已更新！` 
            : '变量更新成功并已保存！';
        this.showSuccess(msg);
        console.log(`[FloatingEditor] 已保存到快照 [${targetIndex + 1}/${this.game.chatHistoryCache.length}]${isHistoryMode ? ' (历史模式)' : ''}`);
        
        this.hasUnsavedChanges = false;
        this.hideErrors();
        
      } else if (errorCommands.length > 0) {
        this.showErrors(errorCommands);
        this.game.showTemporaryMessage(`发现 ${errorCommands.length} 条错误指令，请修正`, 3000);
        
      } else {
        this.game.showTemporaryMessage('未检测到有效状态变更，请确认指令是否正确', 3000);
      }
      
    } catch (error) {
      this.showErrors([error.message]);
      this.game.showTemporaryMessage(`更新失败: ${error.message}`, 3000);
    }
  }

  // 显示错误
  showErrors(errors) {
    const container = this.panel?.querySelector('#floating-editor-errors');
    const list = this.panel?.querySelector('#floating-editor-error-list');
    
    if (!container || !list) return;
    
    if (errors.length === 0) {
      container.style.display = 'none';
      return;
    }
    
    list.innerHTML = errors.map(err => `<li>${err}</li>`).join('');
    container.style.display = 'block';
  }

  // 隐藏错误
  hideErrors() {
    const container = this.panel?.querySelector('#floating-editor-errors');
    if (container) {
      container.style.display = 'none';
    }
  }

  // 显示成功
  showSuccess(message) {
    this.game.showTemporaryMessage(message, 3000);
  }

  // 保存状态
  saveState() {
    try {
      const state = {
        isVisible: this.isVisible,
        isMinimized: this.isMinimized,
        position: this.position,
        buttonPosition: this.buttonPosition // 新增：保存按钮位置
      };
      localStorage.setItem(this.EditorStateModel.STORAGE_KEY, this.EditorStateModel.serialize(state));
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('[FloatingEditor] 保存状态失败:', e);
    }
  }

  // 加载状态
  loadState() {
    try {
      const saved = localStorage.getItem(this.EditorStateModel.STORAGE_KEY);
      if (saved) {
        const state = this.EditorStateModel.deserialize(saved);
        this.isVisible = state.isVisible ?? false;
        this.isMinimized = state.isMinimized ?? false;
        this.position = state.position ?? { x: 20, y: 100 };
        this.buttonPosition = state.buttonPosition ?? { x: null, y: null }; // 新增：加载按钮位置
      }
    } catch (e) {
      console.warn('[FloatingEditor] 加载状态失败:', e);
    }
  }

  // 绑定事件
  bindEvents() {
    // 获取正确的事件目标（全屏时使用全屏元素，否则使用document）
    const getEventTarget = () => {
      return document.fullscreenElement || 
             document.webkitFullscreenElement || 
             document.mozFullScreenElement || 
             document.msFullscreenElement || 
             document;
    };
    
    // 按钮拖动状态变量（需要在外部作用域）
    let buttonDragStart = { x: 0, y: 0 };
    let buttonStartPos = { x: 0, y: 0 };
    let buttonIsDragging = false;
    
    // 动态绑定拖动事件监听器
    const bindDragListeners = () => {
      const target = getEventTarget();
      
      // 移除旧的监听器（如果存在）
      if (this.dragListeners && this.dragListeners.length > 0) {
        this.dragListeners.forEach(({ element, event, handler, options }) => {
          element.removeEventListener(event, handler, options);
        });
        this.dragListeners = [];
      }
      
      // 按钮拖动的鼠标移动事件
      const buttonMouseMoveHandler = (e) => {
        if (buttonIsDragging) {
          const dx = e.clientX - buttonDragStart.x;
          const dy = e.clientY - buttonDragStart.y;
          
          if (Math.abs(dx) > 5 || Math.abs(dy) > 5) {
            this.isButtonDragging = true;
          }
          
          let newX = buttonStartPos.x + dx;
          let newY = buttonStartPos.y + dy;
          
          const btnSize = 48;
          newX = Math.max(0, Math.min(window.innerWidth - btnSize, newX));
          newY = Math.max(0, Math.min(window.innerHeight - btnSize, newY));
          
          if (this.toggleBtn) {
            this.toggleBtn.style.left = `${newX}px`;
            this.toggleBtn.style.top = `${newY}px`;
            this.toggleBtn.style.right = 'auto';
            this.toggleBtn.style.bottom = 'auto';
          }
        }
        
        // 面板拖动
        if (this.isDragging) {
          this.onDrag(e);
        }
      };
      
      const buttonMouseUpHandler = () => {
        if (buttonIsDragging) {
          buttonIsDragging = false;
          if (this.toggleBtn) {
            const rect = this.toggleBtn.getBoundingClientRect();
            this.buttonPosition = { x: rect.left, y: rect.top };
            this.saveState();
          }
          
          setTimeout(() => {
            this.isButtonDragging = false;
          }, 100);
        }
        
        // 面板拖动结束
        if (this.isDragging) {
          this.endDrag();
        }
      };
      
      // 按钮拖动的触摸移动事件
      const buttonTouchMoveHandler = (e) => {
        if (buttonIsDragging && e.touches[0]) {
          const touch = e.touches[0];
          const dx = touch.clientX - buttonDragStart.x;
          const dy = touch.clientY - buttonDragStart.y;
          
          if (Math.abs(dx) > 5 || Math.abs(dy) > 5) {
            this.isButtonDragging = true;
          }
          
          let newX = buttonStartPos.x + dx;
          let newY = buttonStartPos.y + dy;
          
          const btnSize = 48;
          newX = Math.max(0, Math.min(window.innerWidth - btnSize, newX));
          newY = Math.max(0, Math.min(window.innerHeight - btnSize, newY));
          
          if (this.toggleBtn) {
            this.toggleBtn.style.left = `${newX}px`;
            this.toggleBtn.style.top = `${newY}px`;
            this.toggleBtn.style.right = 'auto';
            this.toggleBtn.style.bottom = 'auto';
          }
        }
        
        // 面板拖动
        if (this.isDragging) {
          this.onDrag(e);
        }
      };
      
      const buttonTouchEndHandler = () => {
        if (buttonIsDragging) {
          buttonIsDragging = false;
          if (this.toggleBtn) {
            const rect = this.toggleBtn.getBoundingClientRect();
            this.buttonPosition = { x: rect.left, y: rect.top };
            this.saveState();
          }
          
          setTimeout(() => {
            this.isButtonDragging = false;
          }, 100);
        }
        
        // 面板拖动结束
        if (this.isDragging) {
          this.endDrag();
        }
      };
      
      // 绑定所有事件到正确的目标
      target.addEventListener('mousemove', buttonMouseMoveHandler);
      target.addEventListener('mouseup', buttonMouseUpHandler);
      target.addEventListener('touchmove', buttonTouchMoveHandler, { passive: false });
      target.addEventListener('touchend', buttonTouchEndHandler);
      
      // 保存监听器引用以便后续移除
      this.dragListeners.push(
        { element: target, event: 'mousemove', handler: buttonMouseMoveHandler },
        { element: target, event: 'mouseup', handler: buttonMouseUpHandler },
        { element: target, event: 'touchmove', handler: buttonTouchMoveHandler, options: { passive: false } },
        { element: target, event: 'touchend', handler: buttonTouchEndHandler }
      );
    };
    
    // 切换按钮 - 点击切换面板
    this.toggleBtn?.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      if (this.isButtonDragging) {
        this.isButtonDragging = false;
        return;
      }
      console.log('[FloatingEditor] 按钮被点击，切换面板');
      this.toggle();
    });
    
    // 切换按钮 - 拖动开始（鼠标）
    this.toggleBtn?.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
      buttonIsDragging = true;
      buttonDragStart = { x: e.clientX, y: e.clientY };
      const rect = this.toggleBtn.getBoundingClientRect();
      buttonStartPos = { x: rect.left, y: rect.top };
      e.preventDefault();
    });
    
    // 切换按钮 - 触摸处理（改进版，支持点击和拖动）
    let touchStartTime = 0;
    let touchMoved = false;
    
    this.toggleBtn?.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
      touchStartTime = Date.now();
      touchMoved = false;
      const touch = e.touches[0];
      buttonDragStart = { x: touch.clientX, y: touch.clientY };
      const rect = this.toggleBtn.getBoundingClientRect();
      buttonStartPos = { x: rect.left, y: rect.top };
      // 不阻止默认行为，让点击事件可以触发
    });
    
    this.toggleBtn?.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {
      if (!buttonIsDragging) {
        const touch = e.touches[0];
        const dx = Math.abs(touch.clientX - buttonDragStart.x);
        const dy = Math.abs(touch.clientY - buttonDragStart.y);
        
        // 如果移动超过10px，认为是拖动
        if (dx > 10 || dy > 10) {
          touchMoved = true;
          buttonIsDragging = true;
          e.preventDefault(); // 只在拖动时阻止默认行为
        }
      }
    }, { passive: false });
    
    this.toggleBtn?.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => {
      const touchDuration = Date.now() - touchStartTime;
      
      // 如果没有移动且时间很短，认为是点击
      if (!touchMoved && touchDuration < 300) {
        console.log('[FloatingEditor] 触摸点击，切换面板');
        this.toggle();
      }
      
      buttonIsDragging = false;
      touchMoved = false;
    });
    
    // 初始绑定拖动监听器
    bindDragListeners();
    
    // 监听全屏变化，重新绑定事件监听器
    const fullscreenChangeHandler = () => {
      console.log('[FloatingEditor] 全屏状态变化，重新绑定事件监听器');
      bindDragListeners();
      // 确保元素在正确的容器中
      if (this.ensureCorrectParent) {
        this.ensureCorrectParent();
      }
    };
    
    document.addEventListener('fullscreenchange', fullscreenChangeHandler);
    document.addEventListener('webkitfullscreenchange', fullscreenChangeHandler);
    document.addEventListener('mozfullscreenchange', fullscreenChangeHandler);
    document.addEventListener('MSFullscreenChange', fullscreenChangeHandler);
    
    // 关闭按钮
    this.panel?.querySelector('#floating-editor-close')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
      this.hide();
      this.saveState();
    });
    
    // 最小化按钮
    this.panel?.querySelector('#floating-editor-minimize')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
      if (this.isMinimized) {
        this.expand();
      } else {
        this.minimize();
      }
    });
    
    // 清空按钮
    this.panel?.querySelector('#floating-editor-clear')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
      this.clearCommands();
    });
    
    // 同步按钮
    this.panel?.querySelector('#floating-editor-sync')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
      this.syncFromPanel();
    });
    
    // 应用按钮
    this.panel?.querySelector('#floating-editor-apply')?.addEventListener('click', () => {
      this.applyCommands();
    });
    
    // 面板拖拽开始 - 鼠标
    const header = this.panel?.querySelector('#floating-editor-header');
    if (header) {
      header.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => {
        if (e.target.closest('button')) return;
        this.startDrag(e);
      });
    }
    
    // 面板拖拽开始 - 触摸
    if (header) {
      header.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
        if (e.target.closest('button')) return;
        this.startDrag(e);
      }, { passive: false });
    }
    
    // 窗口调整
    window.addEventListener('resize', () => this.handleResize());
    
    // 文本变化追踪
    this.panel?.querySelector('#floating-editor-textarea')?.addEventListener('input', () => {
      this.hasUnsavedChanges = true;
    });
    
    // 按钮悬停效果
    this.toggleBtn?.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => {
      this.toggleBtn.style.transform = 'scale(1.1)';
    });
    this.toggleBtn?.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
      this.toggleBtn.style.transform = 'scale(1)';
    });
  }

  // 处理窗口调整
  handleResize() {
    if (this.isVisible) {
      this.constrainToViewport();
    }
  }

  // 确保悬浮编辑器元素在正确的父容器中
  ensureCorrectParent() {
    const isFullscreen = !!(document.fullscreenElement || 
                            document.webkitFullscreenElement || 
                            document.mozFullScreenElement || 
                            document.msFullscreenElement);
    
    const rootContainer = document.querySelector('.guixu-root-container');
    
    if (!rootContainer) {
      console.warn('[FloatingEditor] 未找到根容器');
      return;
    }
    
    if (isFullscreen) {
      // 全屏模式：确保元素在root容器中
      if (this.toggleBtn && this.toggleBtn.parentElement !== rootContainer) {
        console.log('[FloatingEditor] 将切换按钮移动到全屏容器');
        rootContainer.appendChild(this.toggleBtn);
      }
      if (this.panel && this.panel.parentElement !== rootContainer) {
        console.log('[FloatingEditor] 将面板移动到全屏容器');
        rootContainer.appendChild(this.panel);
      }
    } else {
      // 非全屏模式：确保元素在body中，并重置按钮位置
      if (this.toggleBtn && this.toggleBtn.parentElement !== document.body) {
        console.log('[FloatingEditor] 将切换按钮移回body');
        document.body.appendChild(this.toggleBtn);
        // 退出全屏时，重置按钮位置到默认位置
        this.resetButtonPosition();
      }
      if (this.panel && this.panel.parentElement !== document.body) {
        console.log('[FloatingEditor] 将面板移回body');
        document.body.appendChild(this.panel);
      }
    }
  }
  
  // 重置按钮位置到默认位置
  resetButtonPosition() {
    if (this.toggleBtn) {
      this.toggleBtn.style.right = '20px';
      this.toggleBtn.style.bottom = '80px';
      this.toggleBtn.style.left = 'auto';
      this.toggleBtn.style.top = 'auto';
      // 清除保存的位置
      this.buttonPosition = { x: null, y: null };
      this.saveState();
      console.log('[FloatingEditor] 按钮位置已重置到默认位置');
    }
  }

  // 设置启用/禁用状态
  setEnabled(enabled) {
    if (enabled) {
      // 显示切换按钮
      if (this.toggleBtn) {
        this.toggleBtn.style.display = 'flex';
      }
    } else {
      // 隐藏切换按钮和面板
      if (this.toggleBtn) {
        this.toggleBtn.style.display = 'none';
      }
      this.hide();
    }
  }
}

// 全局悬浮编辑器实例
let floatingEditorInstance = null;

    class GeorgeMapSystem {

  // 初始化DOM绑定和事件（点击地图按钮后执行）
  initDomAndEvents() {
    if (this.isInitialized) return;
    this.isInitialized = true;

    // 绑定DOM元素
    this.mapModal = document.getElementById("map-modal");
    this.closeMap = document.getElementById("close-map");
    this.zoomIn = document.getElementById("zoom-in");
    this.zoomOut = document.getElementById("zoom-out");
    this.resetMap = document.getElementById("reset-map");
    this.mapViewport = document.getElementById("map-viewport");
    this.mapPannable = document.getElementById("map-pannable");
    this.mapLocations = document.getElementById("map-locations");

    // 绑定事件
    this.closeMap.addEventListener("click", () => this.hideMap());
    this.zoomIn.addEventListener("click", () => this.zoom(0.2));
    this.zoomOut.addEventListener("click", () => this.zoom(-0.2));
    this.resetMap.addEventListener("click", () => this.resetView());
    this.bindDragEvents();
    this.bindWheelZoom();
    this.bindPinchZoom();
  }

  // 显示地图时接收玩家状态数据
  showMap() { // 移除 statData 参数，无需外部传入
  this.initDomAndEvents();
  if (this.mapModal) {
    this.mapModal.style.display = 'flex';

    //console.log('[地图调试] 直接读 GuixuManager 内部数据:', GuixuManager.currentMvuState);
    // 主动获取主内存中的最新状态数据
    const latestStatData = GuixuManager.currentMvuState?.stat_data || {};
    // 强制更新当前状态（覆盖缓存，确保是最新值）
    this.currentStatData = {
      ...this.currentStatData,
      ...latestStatData
    };
    //console.log(`[地图主动拉取] 显示地图时获取最新坐标:`, latestStatData["当前坐标"]);
    this.renderMap();
    this.renderPlayerMarker(); // 此时渲染用的是最新数据
  }
}


  // 隐藏地图
  hideMap() {
  if (this.mapModal) {
    // 与其他弹窗保持一致：用display: none隐藏
    this.mapModal.style.display = 'none';
  }
}


  // 渲染地图区域和地标
  renderMap() {
  this.mapLocations.innerHTML = "";

  // 设置与地图宽高比一致的viewBox
  const MAP_WIDTH = 7400;  // 替换为你地图的实际宽度
  const MAP_HEIGHT = 3800; // 替换为你地图的实际高度
  const aspectRatio = MAP_WIDTH / MAP_HEIGHT;
  const viewBoxWidth = 100;
  const viewBoxHeight = viewBoxWidth / aspectRatio;

  // 正确创建SVG容器（需传入元素名称"svg"）
  const svg = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "svg");
  svg.setAttribute("width", "100%");
  svg.setAttribute("height", "100%");
  svg.setAttribute("viewBox", "0 0 100 51.35");

  this.DEFAULT_LOCATIONS.mainRegions.forEach(region => {
    const polygon = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "polygon");
    polygon.setAttribute("class", "main-region-poly");
    polygon.setAttribute("points", region.points.outer.map(p => `${p.x} ${p.y}`).join(' '));
    polygon.setAttribute("style", `--region-fill: ${region.style.fill}; --region-stroke: ${region.style.stroke}`);
    polygon.setAttribute("data-id", region.id);
    polygon.setAttribute("data-name", region.name);

    const label = document.createElementNS("http://www.w3.org/2000/svg", "text");
    label.setAttribute("class", "region-label");
    label.setAttribute("x", this.getCenterX(region.points.outer));
    label.setAttribute("y", this.getCenterY(region.points.outer));
    label.setAttribute("text-anchor", "middle");
    label.textContent = region.name;

    svg.appendChild(polygon);
    svg.appendChild(label);
  });

  this.mapLocations.appendChild(svg);

  this.DEFAULT_LOCATIONS.landmarks.forEach(landmark => {
    const dot = document.createElement("div");
    dot.className = "landmark-dot";
    dot.style.top = landmark.marker.top;
    dot.style.left = landmark.marker.left;
    dot.setAttribute("data-name", landmark.name);
    dot.setAttribute("data-description", landmark.description);
    this.mapLocations.appendChild(dot);

    const label = document.createElement("div");
    label.className = "landmark-label";
    label.style.top = landmark.marker.top;
    label.style.left = landmark.marker.left;
    label.textContent = landmark.name;
    this.mapLocations.appendChild(label);
  });

  this.updateLOD();
}

  // 【渲染玩家位置标记】
  renderPlayerMarker() {

    // 从当前状态获取位置信息（兼容未定义的情况）
    const { 
      "当前区域": currentRegion, 
      "当前地标": currentLandmark, 
      "当前坐标": currentCoord 
    } = this.currentStatData;

    //console.log(`[渲染日志] 原始坐标：`, currentCoord);
    // 坐标兜底（默认地图中心）
    const coord = currentCoord || { x: 50.0, y: 50.0 };
    // 标记文本（未知区域时显示“未知位置”）
    const markerText = currentRegion === "未知" ? "未知位置" : currentLandmark || currentRegion;

    //const scaledY = coord.y * this.Y_SCALE;

    // 移除旧标记（避免重复）
    const oldMarker = this.mapLocations.querySelector("#map-locations .map-location-marker.current-location");
    if (oldMarker) oldMarker.remove();


    const visualY = coord.y /  GuixuManager.Y_SCALE; // 逻辑y → 视觉y
    const leftStyle = `${coord.x}%`;
    const topStyle = `${visualY}%`;

    // 创建新标记
    const marker = document.createElement("div");
    marker.className = "map-location-marker current-location"; // 用于CSS样式和选择器
    // 定位（基于百分比坐标）
    marker.style.position = "absolute";
    marker.style.left = leftStyle;
    marker.style.top = topStyle;
    marker.style.transform = "translate(-50%, -50%)"; // 中心点对齐
    //console.log(`[渲染日志] 应用的样式：left=${leftStyle}, top=${topStyle}`);
    // 样式内容（可通过CSS自定义）
    marker.innerHTML = `
    <div class="dot"></div>
    <div class="label">${markerText}</div>
  `;

    // 添加到地图容器
    this.mapLocations.appendChild(marker);
  }

  // 【更新玩家状态数据（从_applyUpdateFallback调用）】
  updateStatData(statData) {
    if (!statData) return;
    // 更新缓存的状态
    this.currentStatData = {
      ...this.currentStatData,
      ...statData
    };
    // 如果地图正在显示，实时更新标记
    if (this.mapModal && this.mapModal.style.display === "flex") {
      this.renderPlayerMarker();
    }
  }


  // 计算多边形中心
  getCenterX(points) {
    const xs = points.map(p => p.x);
    return (Math.min(...xs) + Math.max(...xs)) / 2;
  }
  getCenterY(points) {
    const ys = points.map(p => p.y);
    return (Math.min(...ys) + Math.max(...ys)) / 2;
  }

  // 缩放
  zoom(delta) {
    const newScale = this.state.scale + delta;
    if (newScale >= 0.5 && newScale <= 5.0) {
      this.state.scale = newScale;
      this.updateTransform();
      this.updateLOD();
    }
  }

  // 重置视图
  resetView() {
    this.state = { scale: 1.0, x: 0, y: 0 };
    this.updateTransform();
    this.updateLOD();
  }

  // 更新变换
  updateTransform() {
  const viewport = this.mapViewport;
  const cx = viewport.clientWidth / 2;
  const cy = viewport.clientHeight / 2;

  // 变换原点设为视口中心
  this.mapPannable.style.transformOrigin = `${cx}px ${cy}px`;
  // 应用位移和缩放
  this.mapPannable.style.transform = `translate(${this.state.x}px, ${this.state.y}px) scale(${this.state.scale})`;
}

  // 拖拽事件
  bindDragEvents() {
  let isDragging = false;
  let startX, startY;
  let isTouchDrag = false; // 标记是否为触摸拖拽

  // 触摸开始（单指）
  this.mapPannable.addEventListener("touchstart", (e) => {
    if (e.touches.length === 1) { // 仅单指时触发拖拽
      isDragging = true;
      isTouchDrag = true;
      const touch = e.touches[0];
      startX = touch.clientX - this.state.x;
      startY = touch.clientY - this.state.y;
      this.mapPannable.style.cursor = "grabbing";
    }
  });

  // 鼠标开始
  this.mapPannable.addEventListener("mousedown", (e) => {
    isDragging = true;
    isTouchDrag = false;
    startX = e.clientX - this.state.x;
    startY = e.clientY - this.state.y;
    this.mapPannable.style.cursor = "grabbing";
  });

  // 触摸移动（单指）
  document.addEventListener("touchmove", (e) => {
    if (!isDragging || !isTouchDrag || e.touches.length !== 1) return;
    e.preventDefault();
    const touch = e.touches[0];
    this.state.x = touch.clientX - startX;
    this.state.y = touch.clientY - startY;
    this.updateTransform();
  });

  // 鼠标移动
  document.addEventListener("mousemove", (e) => {
    if (!isDragging || isTouchDrag) return;
    this.state.x = e.clientX - startX;
    this.state.y = e.clientY - startY;
    this.updateTransform();
  });

  // 触摸结束
  document.addEventListener("touchend", (e) => {
    if (isTouchDrag) {
      isDragging = false;
      isTouchDrag = false;
      this.mapPannable.style.cursor = "grab";
    }
  });

  // 鼠标结束
  document.addEventListener("mouseup", () => {
    if (!isTouchDrag) {
      isDragging = false;
      this.mapPannable.style.cursor = "grab";
    }
  });
  }

  // 滚轮缩放
  bindWheelZoom() {
    this.mapViewport.addEventListener("wheel", (e) => {
      e.preventDefault();
      const delta = e.deltaY < 0 ? 0.2 : -0.2;
      this.zoom(delta);
    });
  }

  // 双指缩放
  bindPinchZoom() {
  let isPinching = false;
  let initialDistance = 0;
  let initialScale = 1.0;

  // 触摸开始：判断是否双指，记录初始距离和缩放
  this.mapViewport.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => {
    if (e.touches.length === 2) {
      isPinching = true;
      initialDistance = this.getDistance(e.touches[0], e.touches[1]);
      initialScale = this.state.scale;
    }
  });

  // 触摸移动：计算当前距离，更新缩放
  this.mapViewport.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => {
    if (!isPinching || e.touches.length !== 2) return;
    e.preventDefault(); // 阻止页面默认缩放/滚动

    const currentDistance = this.getDistance(e.touches[0], e.touches[1]);
    const scaleFactor = currentDistance / initialDistance;
    const newScale = initialScale * scaleFactor;

    // 限制缩放范围（与现有zoom逻辑保持一致）
    if (newScale >= 0.5 && newScale <= 5.0) {
      this.state.scale = newScale;
      this.updateTransform();
      this.updateLOD();
    }
  });

  // 触摸结束：重置状态
  this.mapViewport.addEventListener('touchend', (e) => {
    if (e.touches.length === 0) {
      isPinching = false;
    }
  });
  }

// 辅助函数：计算两点间距离
  getDistance(touch1, touch2) {
  const dx = touch1.clientX - touch2.clientX;
  const dy = touch1.clientY - touch2.clientY;
  return Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
  }

  // LOD控制
  updateLOD() {
    const scale = this.state.scale;

    const inverseScale = 1 / scale;

    // 同步地标缩放
  document.querySelectorAll('#map-locations .landmark-dot, #map-locations .landmark-label').forEach(el => {
    el.style.setProperty('--landmark-scale', inverseScale);
  });

  // 同步玩家标记缩放
  document.querySelectorAll('#map-locations .map-location-marker.current-location').forEach(marker => {
    marker.style.setProperty('--player-scale', inverseScale);
  });

    // 区域标签
    document.querySelectorAll(".region-label").forEach(label => {
      const isSubRegion = false;
      const config = isSubRegion ? 
        {minScale: 2.0, maxScale: Infinity} : 
        {minScale: 0.5, maxScale: 5.0};
      label.classList.toggle("hidden", !(scale >= config.minScale && scale <= config.maxScale));
    });

    // 地标
    document.querySelectorAll(".landmark-dot").forEach(dot => {
      const label = dot.nextElementSibling;
      dot.classList.toggle("hidden", !(scale >= 0 && scale <= Infinity));
      if (label) {
        label.classList.toggle("hidden", !(scale >= 1.2 && scale <= Infinity));
      }
    });

    // 【玩家标记随缩放显示/隐藏】
    const playerMarker = document.querySelector(".player-marker");
    if (playerMarker) {
      // 缩放小于0.5时隐藏标签（保持点可见）
      const markerLabel = playerMarker.querySelector("div:last-child");
      if (markerLabel) {
        markerLabel.classList.toggle("hidden", scale < 0.5);
      }
    }
  }
}



const MapEarthTool = {
  // 地球级比例尺配置（常量）
  EARTH_CONFIG: {
    mapScaleKm: 40075, // 地球赤道周长（地图横向对应赤道）
    earthTotalArea: 510072000 // 地球总表面积(km²)，用于校验
  },
  // 计算区域实际面积
  calculatePolygonArea: (pointsData) => {
    let points = [];
    // 兼容不同格式的points数据
    if (pointsData?.outer) {
      points = pointsData.outer;
    } else if (Array.isArray(pointsData) && pointsData[0]?.outer) {
      points = pointsData[0].outer;
    } else if (Array.isArray(pointsData)) {
      points = pointsData;
    }
    if (points.length < 3) return 0;

    // 鞋带公式计算百分比面积
    const area = points.reduce((acc, p1, i) => {
      const p2 = points[(i + 1) % points.length];
      return acc + (p1.x * p2.y - p2.x * p1.y);
    }, 0);
    const percentageArea = Math.abs(area / 2);

    // 获取地图宽高比
    const mapImg = document.getElementById('map-image');
    const aspectRatio = mapImg && mapImg.naturalWidth > 0 && mapImg.naturalHeight > 0
      ? mapImg.naturalHeight / mapImg.naturalWidth
      : 7400 / 3800; // 地图原始宽高比

    // 换算成地球级实际面积
    const { mapScaleKm } = MapEarthTool.EARTH_CONFIG;
    return (percentageArea / (100 * 100)) * mapScaleKm * (mapScaleKm / aspectRatio);
  }
};

const GeometryHelper = {
  /**
   * 判断点是否在多边形内（射线法）
   * @param {Object} point - {x,y} 待判断坐标
   * @param {Array} polygon - 多边形顶点数组 [{x,y},...]
   */
  isPointInPolygon: (point, polygon) => {
    let inside = false;
    const x = point.x;
    const y = point.y;
    for (let i = 0, j = polygon.length - 1; i < polygon.length; j = i++) {
      const xi = polygon[i].x;
      const yi = polygon[i].y;
      const xj = polygon[j].x;
      const yj = polygon[j].y;
      const intersect = ((yi > y) !== (yj > y)) && (x < (xj - xi) * (y - yi) / (yj - yi) + xi);
      if (intersect) inside = !inside;
    }
    return inside;
  },

  /**
   * 将点修正到多边形边缘（超出时拉回最近边缘）
   * @param {Object} point - 异常坐标
   * @param {Array} polygon - 目标多边形顶点
   */
  getClampedPointToPolygon: (point, polygon) => {
    const x = point.x;
    const y = point.y;
    const xs = polygon.map(p => p.x);
    const ys = polygon.map(p => p.y);
    const minX = Math.min(...xs);
    const maxX = Math.max(...xs);
    const minY = Math.min(...ys);
    const maxY = Math.max(...ys);

    // 情况1：点在x范围外 → 修正到x边界，y保持原比例
    if (x < minX || x > maxX) {
      const targetX = x < minX ? minX : maxX;
      const yRatio = (y - minY) / (maxY - minY) || 0.5;
      const targetY = minY + yRatio * (maxY - minY);
      return { x: targetX, y: targetY };
    }
    // 情况2：点在y范围外 → 修正到y边界，x保持原比例
    if (y < minY || y > maxY) {
      const targetY = y < minY ? minY : maxY;
      const xRatio = (x - minX) / (maxX - minX) || 0.5;
      const targetX = minX + xRatio * (maxX - minX);
      return { x: targetX, y: targetY };
    }
    // 情况3：在范围内 → 直接返回
    return { x, y };
  }
};
